highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Punjabi University Patiala ranks #46 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

Punjabi University, Patiala admissions 2026 are open. All the latest updates are as follows:

faqs.question: Is admission to Punjabi University worth it?
faqs.answer: Punjabi University, Patiala, has kept up its spree of winning the highest A grade on a four-point scale amongst over 350 universities in the country. The status is awarded by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). Punjabi University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate and Doctorate degree programmes. Candidates can apply online for registration. Punjabi University offers courses in the fields of Pharmacy, Library sciences, Management, Commerce, Languages, Computer Application, Performing Arts, Law, Engineering, and Business Administration. The university also has the provision of Lateral entry for some courses.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Sc at Punjabi University, Patiala?
faqs.answer: To get admission into BSc courses offered at Punjabi University Patiala, candidates are required to qualify their Class 12 from Science stream with relevant subjects (according to the chosen specialisation selcted by candidates. For admission, candidates must have completed their higher senior secondary from CBSE, PSEB, ISC, UP Board,   Maharashtra HSC, MPBSE, Punjabi University Admission. Additionally, the university also accepts valid scores of CUET for admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Punjabi University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc Programmes offered at Punjabi University is between INR 8,060 to INR 4.80 lakh. Punjabi University offers BSc In various specialisations. The duration of the course is 3 years. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks in aggregate in any discipline. Punjabi University admissions are offered on the basis of merit in the qualifying examination and for some courses marks obtained in the entrance examination. The university conducts an interview for admission to every course.

college_info.intro:
Punjab University Patiala offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The university offers BTech and MBA programme to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Punjabi University courses are offered in full-time mode in several specialisations.
Some of the popular specialisations offered under the BTech programme are Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, and more. These courses are highly sought after among students for their placements and career growth with MBA graduates able to take on roles under business analytics, as consultants or even leadership positions. While BTech graduates can take up a range of technical roles. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Punjab University Patiala in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Punjabi University placement report 2025 has not been fully released by the university yet and will be updated here once out. So far a total of 17 recruiters participated during placements and offered job roles to BTech and MCA graduates with the highest package being INR 6 LPA. Also, a few top recruiters who participated during placements were KPMG, Tech Mahindra, Jio, etc.

In 2023, the highest and average package offered in 2023 were INR 13.70 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Further, over 35 recruiters participated and presented more than 141 job offers to the students of the batch 2023. TCS, KPMG, Jio, Tech Mahindra were among the top recruiters of Punjabi University Patiala.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students can work with faculty on research projects
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Punjabi University extends a number of undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and certificate programme across the streams of Science, Commerce, Management, Arts and Culture, Social Sciences, Law, etc. such as:

faqs.answer: A:    Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.

review_content.Placements: In the session of 2024-25, there are 75% students got placements in CSE in startup and non-technical companies. The highest package in this session 2025 was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. If we come to average, it is around 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internship opportunity offered by startup companies. Roles offered are system analyst, full-stack developer, and senior testing engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is also available. Labs are well-equipped with modern computers, machines, and tools.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Crazy campus Life, low study stress.

review_content.Placements: I have given 2 stars in case of placements because placements are not done properly in our course. A few of the students get recruited via teachers references, whereas others, vice versa, have to find jobs by themselves. I must say our alumni are most connected to the tour department, and teachers can actually help us get into the good institutions like Indian Express, local Punjab channel, AIR, and web channel.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department is good, they have 2 Studios. One has a teleprompter, cameras, and a recording studio, while the other one is audio studio for recording audio and podcasts. But the infrastructure is not as much as required for the course. The media department needs more infrastructure. While the university in general is very good, they have Wi-Fi all over the campus. A big library and reading room on the campus. Every hostel has its own reading rooms. Mess food is affordable, and canteen food is amazing and affordable. Campus Life is amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.B.A. (Five Years Integrated Programme) in Financial Markets and Applied Management - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: The college helps provide practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Our department provides placements after the third year, and many companies visit for placements. Recently, Infosys visited. I don't know exactly the package, but it was around 2-3 LPA. Infosys is considered a top recruiting company. Almost 90 percent of students get placements. Top roles help in gaining practical knowledge and real-life case studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: I am in my 3rd year, and approximately 30 percent of students get placement from this college. The highest package offered is 20 LPA. Top one that Microsoft visited once, but now Infosys comes here for placement. Internship in the 8th sem is totally about it, so every student has to make a project, which is considered as training time. Data handling, Software, AI expert, and for research too.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has almost all kinds of facilities, good water, all labs have AC, the lecture hall has projectors, and the library area is good. The quality of food is average, but it has a canteen, Wi-Fi in the hostel too, and medical facilities all the time, and time to time events for hostelers at least once a year have been done.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College does not have proper infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In this college, not many companies come for placements. This college does not have proper guidance for students. Students are struggling for placements. The college is not utilized properly. They have zero percent of students who have received an internship from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Mess and canteen food are very bad, they do not clean properly. Only 50 student seats can be accommodated in the one-time library. The college has not been cleaned properly. Classrooms are not clean. This college does not have Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are very bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It's an autonomous organisation.

review_content.Placements: The rate of recruitment would be moderate, and sometimes create a shortfall in recruitment due to the lack of proper guidance and arrangements. Looking for companies with the highest salary packages above 5 LPA but the moderate package would be below 3.6 LPA, and it was mostly the core segments only.
review_content.Infrastructure: This was a kind of conservative and also autonomous college. Libraries were like a mini knowledge hub with maximum collections of books and also available with soft copies which should be accessible by all the students studying in the college. The special access card for visiting libraries and laboratories was provided to all the students.

overview_faqs.question: How beneficial is an MBA from the Punjabi University Patiala?
overview_faqs.answer: An MBA degree from Punjabi University, Patiala can be beneficial for your career in a number of ways: Improved job prospects: An MBA degree from a recognised institution like Punjabi University can help you enhance your career prospects and increase your earning potential. It can open up opportunities for advancement in your current organisation or help you secure a better job in a new company. Specialised knowledge: An MBA programme typically covers a wide range of business and management topics, giving you a comprehensive understanding of various business functions and operations. This knowledge can be applied in various industries, including finance, marketing, operations, and human resources, to name a few. Networking opportunities: Pursuing an MBA programme can also provide you with valuable networking opportunities. admission_overview.college_name: Punjabi University Patiala Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Punjabi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Punjabi University admissionsare based on entrance exam scores or merit. The university accepts scores in JEE Main, GATE, etc. for specific courses. The university offers in Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, etc. Punjabi University offers programmes at UG and PG levels.

Punjabi University shortlists  candidates based on entrance exam scores for a few courses. Admission to most of the courses is based on the qualifying exam. Candidates also have to further participate in the Punjabi University counselling process. Check below popular courses of Punjabi University along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and English as their subjects with a minimum of 50% aggregate (for General Category)

Check below step-wise Punjabi University admission process:
1: Punjabi University Application Process
Aspirants have to fill out the application form for the preferred course on the university's website. Candidates need to pay an application fee and upload the documents to submit the form.
2: Selection
The university accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech. The selection for most of the other courses based on merit.
3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Selected aspirants have to further participate in the counselling rounds. The seats are allotted to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is admission to Punjabi University worth it?
faqs.answer: Punjabi University, Patiala, has kept up its spree of winning the highestA grade on a four-point scaleamongst over 350 universities in the country. The status is awarded by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). Punjabi University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate and Doctorate degree programmes. Candidates can apply online for registration. Punjabi University offers courses in the fields of Pharmacy, Library sciences, Management, Commerce, Languages, Computer Application, Performing Arts, Law, Engineering, and Business Administration. The university also has the provision of Lateral entry for some courses.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for Punjabi University Patiala?
faqs.answer: Punjabi University imparts over 800 courses in a variety of fields ranging from Engineering, Law, Science, Arts & Humanities, Commerce and Accounting, Management, Computers & IT, Pharmacy to Library sciences, and many more. Admission to all these courses is based on the aggregate score of the candidates in the qualifying exams. Tabulated below are a few Punjabi University courses along with their percentage:Class 12 with 45-50 %CoursesEligibilityBTechClass 12 with 45-60 %BAClass 12 with 50 %Bachelor's Degree with 45-50 %BScClass 12 with 45-60 %MScBachelor's Degree with 50 %BAClass 12 with 33-50 %BACheck here for course-wise percentage required.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Sc at Punjabi University, Patiala?
faqs.answer: To get admission into BSc courses offered at Punjabi University Patiala, candidates are required to qualify their Class 12 from Science stream with relevant subjects (according to the chosen specialisation selcted by candidates. For admission, candidates must have completed their higher senior secondary from CBSE,PSEB, ISC,UP Board,   Maharashtra HSC, MPBSE,Punjabi University Admission. Additionally, the university also accepts valid scores of CUET for admission.

placement_data.title: Punjabi University Patiala Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Punjabi University has released the placement details for its Engineering and MCA batch 2025. A total of 17 recruiters participated during Punjabi University placements 2025 and presented various job offers to the BTech and MCA batch 2025. The highest package secured by students was INR 6 LPA whereas the lowest salary achieved was INR 2.65 LA. The top recruiters of Punjabi University Patiala in 2025 include Zoxima Solutions, Infosys, SafeAeon,Quark Software, etc.
Earlier, the highest package secured by batch 2024 stood at INR 11 LPA. In 2023 , over 35 recruiters participated and presented more than 141 job offers to the students.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Punjabi University placements?
faqs.answer: The average package offered at Punjabi University placements 2024 is yet to be released on the official website. However, the Punjabi University average package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 5 LPA. The same is presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Average package INR 5 LPA Additionally, Punjabi University has released the median package offered in 2023 in the NIRF report 2024. Check out the table below for the course-wise median package offered during Punjabi University placements 2023: Course Median Package (2023) UG 3-year ( BA , BSc , LLB ) INR 4.25 LPA UG 4-year ( BTech , BPharm ) INR 4.28 LPA UG 5-year ( BA LLB ) INR 3.50 LPA PG 1-year ( PGDCA , PG Diploma ) INR 2.50 LPA PG 2-year ( MBA , MA , MSc ) INR 5 LPA PG 3-year INR 5.50 LPA

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Punjabi University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc Programmes offered at Punjabi University is between INR 8,060 to INR 4.80 lakh. Punjabi University offers BSc In various specialisations. The duration of the course is 3 years. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks in aggregate in any discipline. Punjabi University admissions are offered on the basis of merit in the qualifying examination and for some courses marks obtained in the entrance examination. The university conducts an interview for admission to every course.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee structure of Punjabi University Patiala?
faqs.answer: Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.

The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Punjabi University Patiala rankings.

rankings.highlight: 8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Punjab In 2025

nirf.description:
Punjabi University Patiala has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala fell 13 ranks to #59 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Baba Farid College, Baba Farid Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.
reviews.review_text: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is als...

reviews.review_heading: Crazy campus Life, low study stress.
reviews.review_text: Our department is good, they have 2 Studios. One has a teleprompter, cameras, and a recording studio, while the other one is audio studio for recording audio and podcasts. But the infrastructure is not as much as required for the course. The media department needs more infrastructure. While the university in general is very good, they have Wi-Fi all over the campus. A big library and reading room on the campus. Every hostel has its own reading rooms. Mess food is affordable, and canteen food is ...

reviews.review_heading: The college helps provide practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: It has almost all kinds of facilities, good water, all labs have AC, the lecture hall has projectors, and the library area is good. The quality of food is average, but it has a canteen, Wi-Fi in the hostel too, and medical facilities all the time, and time to time events for hostelers at least once a year have been done.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Ranbir CollegeReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College does not have proper infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Mess and canteen food are very bad, they do not clean properly. Only 50 student seats can be accommodated in the one-time library. The college has not been cleaned properly. Classrooms are not clean. This college does not have Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are very bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Mata Gujri CollegeReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's an autonomous organisation.
reviews.review_text: This was a kind of conservative and also autonomous college. Libraries were like a mini knowledge hub with maximum collections of books and also available with soft copies which should be accessible by all the students studying in the college. The special access card for visiting libraries and laboratories was provided to all the students.

reviews.review_heading: This is my favorite university.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with all facilities on the campus, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, library, etc. The hotel facilities include AC rooms, RO Water, Wi-Fi, etc. The quality of food is poor. It is anyway, and the canteen is not even compulsory. We have infrastructure facilities for sports and games as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Lamrin Tech Skills UniversityReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall average experience with decent facilities, basic placements, and scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available, and they serve the purpose well. The hostel and mess also cover the basic needs, the food is manageable, and the canteen options are also too. Medical support, sports, and games are provided, though somewhere the infrastructure lags.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Doaba Group of Colleges, MohaliReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Manonmaniam Sundaranar University CollegeReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for nature lovers.
reviews.review_text: The campus has full Wi-Fi. It is full of nature with trees on all sides. It is good for photography. The hostel is good with neat rooms. The food is better. The library has books for all entrance exams, like NEET, GATE, government exams, etc. Classrooms are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus Life.
reviews.review_text: GCCBA 50  BBA department has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a well equipped library. Hostel offers clean rooms and basic amenities. Mess food is nutritious, and the canteen is affordable. Medical aid is available on campus. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games, promoting fitness and teamwork.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Strong faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: GCCBA 50 offers SMART classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a well-stocked library for BBA students. Hostel has clean rooms, study areas, and basic amenities. Mess serves balanced meals, though variety could improve. The canteen is affordable and a popular hangout spot for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Baba Farid College, Baba Farid Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good and excellent. Good facilities are provided.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of this college include a van facility for students who are from different places, and the infrastructure of this college is good. The college is a fully AC campus with libraries, classrooms, etc. Wi-Fi is available on this campus, and the food facilities are good in the hostel. Sports are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but scope for more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college offers Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, computer labs, and a good library. The infrastructure is well-maintained and suitable for academic needs. The hostel is clean with basic amenities. Food in the mess is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports options include a basketball court, cricket ground, and indoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Aryans Group of CollegesReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I will say one thing, this is the best college. Take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were incredible. Everything was excellent, and they took care of the students well. Hostel was on the side of college with a good environment and healthy food. The wardens there were very helpful and took care of every student like they were in their home.

college_info.intro:
Sarala Birla University offers more than 25 programmes across 12 Schools on campus. Sarala Birla University is known for its flagship BTech, MSc, and MBA programmes. The course duration varies from 1 year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. Sarala Birla University offers postgraduate courses such as MBA, MTech, MSc and many more in the disciplines of Engineering & Computer Sciences, Humanities & Linguistics, Commerce & Business Management, Legal Studies, Pharmacy, and Yoga & Naturopathy. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sarala Birla University and their respective eligibility and fees:
Check out the following video on Sarala Birla University BCA review:

placements.overview: Sarala Birla University has concluded the 2024 placements for , , , and other courses. The offered was , and the average package stood at INR 5 LPA. The placement rate recorded was 80%. In addition to this, over 110 companies offered jobs to the eligible students. The at Sarala Birla University facilitates the process of placement of students passing out from the University, besides collaborating with leading organisations in setting up internship and training programs for students. The list of top recruiters included Aditya Birla Fashion & Retail, Aditya Birla Capital, Aditya Birla Insulators, Grasim Industries Limited, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Ernst & Young, Dell Technologies, HCL Technologies, Barclays, Wipro, etc. The key highlights of Sarala Birla University placements 2024 are tabulated below:

faqs.answer: A:    The SBU Ranchi placement process is elaborated below:Invitation and Initiation: Invitations are extended to prospective companies by T&P Cell. Companies send the Job Description to T&P Cell and eligibility criteria is designed. Forms and CVs are collected from Students.In-campus/ Onine Placement Drive: Company Conducts Pre-Placement Talk. Company organises selection process, it may consists of- Skill / Aptitude / Psychomatric Assestment, etc. Final list of the selected students is announce

faqs.question: Can I join Sarala Birla University without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates seeking admission to the BPharma programme of SBU must fulfil the Sarala Birla University BPharma eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria require applicants to have passed Class 12 from any recognised board in India with a minimum aggregate of 50% in English and Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics (PCM/PCB). A relaxation of 5% in the minimum eligibility requirement is provided to the candidates belonging to the SC/ST/PwD category.

review_summary.college_name: Sarala Birla University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) in Accounts - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nice college. It gives great opportunities.

content.Placements: Every 9 out of 10 students get placed every year from B.Com (Hons.) in Accounts. The average package is around 4–5 LPA. Companies like TCS, TATA Motors, Reliance, etc., come as recruiters. We also have internship programmes that help us learn practical skills. Different firms approach us for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in SBU, Ranchi are wonderful, but there is still some place for improvement. There’s often a network problem inside the campus, and Wi-Fi is not available throughout. Apart from this, everything is great. Hostels run very properly and provide good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) in Accounts - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Sarala Birla University offers good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements.

content.Placements: The placement record of SBU has been quite promising in recent years. Around 75%-80% of students across courses like B.Tech, BCA, MBA, and BBA manage to secure jobs through campus recruitment. The highest package reported has gone up to 16 LPA-25 LPA, while the average package usually stays around 5 LPA-6 LPA. The lowest packages are generally in the 3 LPA-3.5 LPA range. These figures vary depending on the course and batch, but overall, placements are considered good compared to many private universities in the region.
content.Infrastructure: The university has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms. Hostel rooms are spacious and clean, and medical help is available. Mess food could be better, but it is manageable. Sports facilities are decent, giving students enough options for recreation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great college in Ranchi, Jharkhand.

content.Placements: I guess in BBA there are a lot of students, and even in MBA. Because, for management, my college is good at teaching. The highest package was 14 LPA. All students get internships here. Our college provides internships to all students, and they also give us the opportunity to find internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are really good. We have a separate library where we can find all the course-related books. The hostel facilities are very great, we've got Wi-Fi, laundry, water supply, warden Ma'ams are great with us, they are just like family, we had nothing to worry about, it was just like our second home. The food is great, hygienic, and tasty. There is an activity room in our hostel where you can find all indoor games and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the things are good.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed at Sarala Birla University, with most companies recruiting for sales jobs. The highest package reaches up to 7-8 LPA, the average is 4-5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies at this university include Byju's, Hindustan Unilever Ltd, TCS, Vodafone Idea Ltd, HDFC Mutual Fund, and Board Infinity. The minimum number of internships offered by the college was in virtual mode.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, with labs, classrooms equipped with digital boards, and a library. Hostel facilities are average. The quality of food is average to good, with the canteen food being particularly good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also average.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B (Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for LL.B. College. The campus is very nice.

content.Placements: At Sarla Birla University, Ranchi, the placement record is good. Around 80% of students get placed every year. The highest package offered is about 16 LPA, and the average package is around 5 LPA. Some of the top companies that visit the campus include TCS, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, HCL, EY, Tata Power, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is modern and well-maintained. The campus is spread over 60 acres and has smart classrooms, computer and Science labs, a well-stocked library, medical support, and transportation services. Hostel facilities are also available - girls have hostels inside the campus and boys have hostels nearby. The hostels are safe, but some students feel the food and water services can be improved.

admission_overview.title: Sarala Birla University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description:
Sarala Birla University admission is based on both merit and entrance exams depending on the programme. Students can pursue UG and PG programmes at the university. These are offered in the fields of Engineering, Computer Applications, Science, Management, and more. The university offers these programmes through its different faculties. The applications can be submitted online. Students can learn about courses, eligibility, and admission of Sarala Birla University in the sections below. Download:
Sarala Birla University Admission Guidelines

The selection criteria for most of the courses is merit-based. The university may ask students to submit entrance test scores or appear for interviews as required. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the top Sarala Birla University courses:

admission_process.title: Sarala Birla University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheSarala Birla University admission processconsist of three simple steps, they are Registration, Shortlisting and Result & Admission offer. Before applying, students have to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online or offline. The Sarala Birla University admission process is as given below:
SBU Application Process

The application forms are released on the official website of SBU. Qualified students must fill theSBU application formsbefore the deadline. The application fee is INR 1,000 to INR 2,000. The application can also be purchased offline by directly walking-in to the university's admission fees.
Selection Process

Admission to most of the SBU courses is merit-based. Students are shortlisted based on marks in the qualifying exam. The university also conducts an entrance test for some programmes, such as PhD. Those with valid scores in other accepted tests are exempted from appearing for the in-house test.
Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates are required to pay theSarala Birla University feesand appear for the verification of documents to confirm their admission.

faqs.answer: Sarala Birla University feesare inclusive of various components, such as tuition fees, registration fees, application fees, caution money, development fees, and more. placement_data.title: Sarala Birla University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Sarala Birla University placement cell facilitates the placement process of passing out students. It provides facilities to conduct group discussions, tests and interviews. It organizes seminars and PDP lectures to make students ready for their industry experience. The University has concluded its placement highlights for various programs like BTech , MBA , BCom and others. Out of the 697 students a total of 421 students secured placements. The highest and average package offered to students duringSarala Birla University, Ranchi placements was INR 9 LPA and INR 3.9 LPA , respectively. Deloitte, Accenture, TCS, Intellipaat were a part of the 2025 placement drive.

reviews.review_text: The facilities are really good. We have a separate library where we can find all the course-related books. The hostel facilities are very great, we've got Wi-Fi, laundry, water supply, warden Ma'ams are great with us, they are just like family, we had nothing to worry about, it was just like our second home. The food is great, hygienic, and tasty. There is an activity room in our hostel where you can find all indoor games and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: All the things are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with labs, classrooms equipped with digital boards, and a library. Hostel facilities are average. The quality of food is average to good, with the canteen food being particularly good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also average.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for LL.B. College. The campus is very nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is modern and well-maintained. The campus is spread over 60 acres and has smart classrooms, computer and Science labs, a well-stocked library, medical support, and transportation services. Hostel facilities are also available - girls have hostels inside the campus and boys have hostels nearby. The hostels are safe, but some students feel the food and water services can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well in its place. Birla Group at its place has a very good infrastructure and a very wide campus. Campus is highly satisfying and the facilities are also very good that are being provided to the students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure facilities with pleasant surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college is outstanding. It is huge and environment friendly as it has greenery all around. The surroundings are also so quite and pleasant. Classrooms are not so huge but acceptable. It has library, sports room, computer labs, and many other labs for the science students. Hostel facility is also quite good. The food from the canteen and mess is fresh and tastes good. It has medical facilities available and also provides sports facilities but can enhance in this field.

reviews.review_heading: BVA at SBU empowers artists and helps change the perception of art careers.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and clean, with basic tools for art students. Wi-Fi and the library are decent. Hostel rooms are well-maintained and secure. Mess food is average. Medical help and sports facilities are available. The environment is calm and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Students got jobs from this college in 2015. I have a good experience here.
reviews.review_text: The lab facility is good. All types of machines and other objects are available for all courses. Every classroom has an LED, and monitor for studying, and also a projector. In the library, the system is good for studying alone silently with arrangements too.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024 and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent, no doubt. In the mess, we have Wi-Fi. Every single classroom is perfect, and library is also so good. All facilities are excellent in hostel. Rooms are AC and non-AC, the food which are given in the mess and canteen is in a good amount. Perfect college for students and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: I will not advise anyone to take admission in this college. Personally, I am dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark and is not maintained. It is mainly not in use by the students. The library does not have sufficient books. Management is also not good. Hostels are also hygienic. There is a mess on the campus. It said that Wi-Fi is for students, but in reality, it is not a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and neither is it for students. Only the authority has access to Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Little dissatisfied with attitude but provides a better job recommendation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well-equipped with a library, modern labs, and big hostel accommodation. The quality of the food is above average and sports and games competitions are done on a regular basis about 4-5 in a month. Many big shots are also invited in the programs held by this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good canteen.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. The hostel is fabulous with 24/7 electricity. There is a hot water facility in the winter. Canteen and mess are just amazing, the food quality is top-notch. It is hygienic, you'll love the taste, overall, it's value for money. You should try.

reviews.review_heading: The college website doesn't work properly. Food quality is top-notch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. We have access to labs. Every room has a smart board and a projector. There is a 24/7 electricity supply, and we have purified water, either cold or hot, to choose from. The quality and hygiene of the mess and canteen food are top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite well. SBU has the best infrastructure in Ranchi. It provides Wi-Fi and classrooms have a digital board. The library is also there with Wi-Fi and books for all departments. We can also access online journals and Manuptra for law students.

review_summary.college_name: Sree Chitra Thirunal College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Automobile) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: SCTCE is good when it comes to academics.

content.Placements: Honesty, placements are not that good. Core companies rarely show up for Auto, so most of us just end up in mass recruiter IT jobs. SCT is good at academics, but the degree alone is useless. If I don't grind coding or Machines learning on the side, I'm not getting a job.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. Campus is tiny, basically a school with no ground for football. Auto labs are decent, there's alot of KSRTC buses. There isn't any college hostel but college approved private hostels. Facilities are bare minimum but the college is located in a city.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placement records and a vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: The overall placement was 35 percent in 2024. The highest package is 34 LPA from a software/IT branch. The median package is 5.2 LPA for B.Tech. The average package is 4- 6 LPA for CS and ECE departments. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Recruitment is largely dominated by the IT sector. Although core electronics and design companies also visit. Top companies include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, UST Global, Oracle, and Tata Elxsi. The college actively promotes and secures internships. Internship companies include Tata Elxsi, bTrizlabs, Accubits, and Infosys. Top roles include Software Engineer and Electronic Design Engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied here.

content.Placements: Above 40 percent of students are placed in our course. Average package is 8 LPA. Mainly Tata, Elix, other automobile companies, and industrial companies come for recruitment from our college. Above 60 percent of students got internships. It is a better college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructural conditions for studying mainly for mechanical students. It consists of modern equipment using labs and good lab faculty members. More importantly, it only has a limited place for play ground. It also doesn't have an auditorium but it has seminar halls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: Several companies like Infosys, Amazon, etc., come for the placement drive annually. At least 15 students get paid internships in the 4th year. The highest package in 2025 is 34 LPA from Amazon, received by two students from the AI and ML branches. The 2024 scheme provides internships in the 4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, college hostels aren't available, but there are several hostels nearby. Wi-Fi is available, and labs are of top quality. The college has a library. There are department libraries too. Classrooms are average. The canteen operates almost daily. Sports are active, even though the ground is small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology and Biochemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college mechanical lab is one of the big labs among the Kerala engineering colleges.

content.Placements: Our college offers placements in top companies like Amazon. There is a concession available for KSRTC-related jobs and the EZ category. Google and Amazon are top companies that visited our college for placements. Students with good CGPA and performance will be selected for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good lab system and good classrooms. The college does not have a hostel. There are 2 canteens and one is the mini canteen. The canteen food is good and tasty. The mini canteen has snack items like Vada and cold drinks.

highlights.description: Sree Chitra Thirunal College of Engineering has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #195 in the Engg category by The Week 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Sree Chitra Thirunal College of Engineering rankings:

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among The Week Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2025

hostel_campus.college_name: Sree Chitra Thirunal College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: IIST has a dedicated Placement Cell that works closely with students to match their interests with appropriate
Heat and Mass Transfer Operations Lab
Reaction Engineering and Process Control Lab
labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Microbiology  Lab, Biochemistry Lab, Molecular Biology Lab, Heat and Mass Transfer Operations Lab, Reaction Engineering and Process Control Lab

reviews.review_heading: SCTCE is good when it comes to academics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Campus is tiny, basically a school with no ground for football. Auto labs are decent, there's alot of KSRTC buses. There isn't any college hostel but college approved private hostels. Facilities are bare minimum but the college is located in a city.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placement records and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar. The ECE department is well-regarded for its laboratory facilities, with a focus on both core electronics and emerging fields. The college is equipped with a cutting-edge computer network and internet facility. There is a Central Computing Facility (CCF). Classrooms are generally well-maintained, and some are smart classes equipped with projectors. The Central Library is well-stocked, with a collection of over 30,000 books. A Digital Library is also available. The food in the ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied here.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructural conditions for studying mainly for mechanical students. It consists of modern equipment using labs and good lab faculty members. More importantly, it only has a limited place for play ground. It also doesn't have an auditorium but it has seminar halls.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Currently, college hostels aren't available, but there are several hostels nearby. Wi-Fi is available, and labs are of top quality. The college has a library. There are department libraries too. Classrooms are average. The canteen operates almost daily. Sports are active, even though the ground is small.

reviews.review_heading: Our college mechanical lab is one of the big labs among the Kerala engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good lab system and good classrooms. The college does not have a hostel. There are 2 canteens and one is the mini canteen. The canteen food is good and tasty. The mini canteen has snack items like Vada and cold drinks.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCT College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel on campus. Instead, students are accommodated in private hostels which are approved by the college which is also near to it. Our campus area is small as compared to other engineering colleges. But there are enough lab facilities, classrooms, and libraries for every department.

reviews.review_heading: A great institute for undergraduates.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. They keep improving the facilities according to the changing needs of students. Hostels provided are well-maintained and checked upon regularly. Canteens are clean. The food provided is of decent quality. The canteen service is satisfying.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus environment but a poor quantity of area and a lack of football ground.
reviews.review_text: Good lab facilities are there. Strict lab rules should be followed and proper care for ourselves should be taken. Lab machines are a little bit old. There is no Wi-Fi. We have good classrooms, projectors, and everything. There is no hostel. The food in the canteen is average but worth the money paid. We have a good library.

reviews.review_heading: SCT review facilities, studies, and campus space.
reviews.review_text: The space is very small but still, they are making the most of it by providing facilities. Even though they are old, limited sources are there. Water tank facilities are very poor. Most of the time, it contains bacteria. The need for a ground is very important at our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good in the past, but now it is just a shadow of what it used to be.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have its own hostel. The campus is very small and doesn't have a football ground or proper sports facilities. The mechanical lab has outdated equipment that is not commonly used in the industry today. There is free Wi-Fi in the library, and the library facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: The environment is good, while placements, infrastructure, and facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are average, and the college does not have a big campus. However, it is not too bad, as you can use the available facilities to learn and explore. There is no proper hostel inside the campus. Sports and games are good, with active student participation and many competitions. The college union organizes numerous cultural events. Technical events are also conducted by societies like IEEE, IEDC, and GDSC.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and fest experience. Better placements and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: As of now, we don't have a college hostel. It is in progress. In the case of courses and classrooms, we have very good rooms with sufficient space. A Wi-Fi connection is provided by the college in and outside the library and on the campus. The canteen provides well-nourishing food and drinks.

reviews.review_heading: SCT is for biotechnology people.
reviews.review_text: No hostel is present at this college. There are many paying guest facilities for the students. Many students rent homes instead of hostels. There is Wi-Fi on the campus that is authenticated by the staff. The college area is very limited. There is no ground or auditorium. Lab facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: Average teaching facility, limited campus space, and good infrastructure and amenities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-maintained and air-conditioned labs. The classrooms are adequately large. The washrooms are average but can be improved. The college provides a huge library where there's adequate space for students to sit and study. The mess facility is average. There's an outdoor basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Average college experience with limited campus space and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: College provides various facilities like good labs, classrooms with smart boards, a central library, and a library for each department. Wi-Fi is also available in labs and the library. College hostel is not provided in our college, so we rent separate PGs which are recommended by the college. The food in the canteen is satisfactory, although it could be better. Sports and extracurricular activities are good in our college. A basketball court and shuttle court are present. Medical facilities are ...

There are many core companies arriving, so it won't be difficult for a student who has thorough knowledge in the subject for getting those jobs.

likes.text: There are two series exams, our college get us ready before semester exams usually the exams are easy, but difficulty depends upon the type of subject of exam.
Faculty members are well qualified and have a good amount of teaching skills and knowledge.

likes.text: Our college is very support for extra curricular activities, Also our college helps students to get many scholarships from outside.
The annual fest of the college called Cult A Way is one of the best college fests in Kerala and the best from Trivandrum.

review_content.Placements: Placements to my knowledge are good. I know some of my seniors who got placed in good companies. Top companies like L&T, Wipro, etc., come every year with decent salary packages. CS is the branch that has the best placement. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 24 LPA to my knowledge.

faqs.answer: To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below: Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

review_summary.college_name: NSS College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall adjustable college.

content.Placements: 30 to 40 percent of students were placed from my batch. Around 8 LPA is the highest package, and 3 LPA is the lowest. Some major companies that came for placement are Paletro, UST, Tarento, Zoho, and TCS. Only a few students got internship opportunities from the college. Most of them are selected as trainees and system engineers.
content.Infrastructure: We have a central library as well as a department library. Wi-Fi is available in the library, main block and new block. We have classrooms with projectors. The college hostel is congested but affordable with good food. We have one canteen and the food is of average quality. Our college provides a small sick room especially for girls who are suffering from period camps. Our college is very active in sports and won many prizes and became overall champions many times.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college with good teachers and environment.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students are placed in our college. The lowest package is 6 LPA, and the highest package is 15 LPA. There are so many companies coming for placements in our department. The main companies are TCS, Alstom, Tarento, and they are taking more students in our department. They provide core offers and also provide other offers.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very neat and clean, and have a projector in every class. Lab also has all types of equipment which helps students. The lab continuing all components without any defect, and the staff monitor our activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would be happier if we had more celebrations. I can rate my college 3.5 out of 5.

content.Placements: Placements to my knowledge are good. I know some of my seniors who got placed in good companies. Top companies like L&T, Wipro, etc., come every year with decent salary packages. CS is the branch that has the best placement. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 24 LPA to my knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Quality of the facilities in my hostel and the food are good. Food is healthy and tasty. College is about 120 acres but most of them are not used or are left to waste like a forest. It could be better if those places are used widely and effectively.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Campus for Passionate Engineers.

content.Placements: We know NSSCE stands in a highly valued position in Kerala and has a great placement unit and management system. Top companies like L&T, Alstom, TCS, Sobha Construction, etc. Approach this college for their recruitment offering good starting to high paying packages. The highest package recorded is 16 to 24LPA, and the lowest starting around 3LPA with an average of 5 to 9 LPA. Around 75 to 85 percent of students get placed with 50 percent core placements. Top roles offered in mechanical engineering Nssce would be Core engineers, Designers and in the Tech field in manufacturing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Instrumentation and Control Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied, no problem in academics and faculties. Keep fewer expectations about college programs.

content.Placements: In the 2024 pass-out batch, over 95% of students were placed in my course. The highest package offered so far was 24 LPA, and the average is about 7-9 LPA. The lowest offers are 1.5-2 LPA. Reliance Industries Ltd., Quest, L&T, and Schneider Electric are some of the top recruiting companies. Internships, I think, are on an application basis.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi for students. Most labs are good and have acceptable facilities. However, the EDC Lab has only a few functioning components (Function generator, CRO). The classroom is a 6/10 - seating is comfortable, but overall, the class and infrastructure are okay. The library is very good (only till 5 PM). Sports and games are highly encouraged in our college. In the college hostel, the food is really good. I have never had any food poisoning experience. Girls can be out only till 7 PM. Both hostels have Wi-Fi. Students have many other choices besides the college hostel (PGs and hostels), which, in my opinion, are far better.

Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 23,767 - 34,600for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.answer: To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below:Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

hostel_campus.college_name: NSS College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall adjustable college.
reviews.review_text: We have a central library as well as a department library. Wi-Fi is available in the library, main block and new block. We have classrooms with projectors. The college hostel is congested but affordable with good food. We have one canteen and the food is of average quality. Our college provides a small sick room especially for girls who are suffering from period camps. Our college is very active in sports and won many prizes and became overall champions many times.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good teachers and environment.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very neat and clean, and have a projector in every class. Lab also has all types of equipment which helps students. The lab continuing all components without any defect, and the staff monitor our activities.

reviews.review_heading: I would be happier if we had more celebrations. I can rate my college 3.5 out of 5.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Quality of the facilities in my hostel and the food are good. Food is healthy and tasty. College is about 120 acres but most of them are not used or are left to waste like a forest. It could be better if those places are used widely and effectively.

reviews.review_heading: Campus for Passionate Engineers.
reviews.review_text: The college was initiated and built in the 1960s, the building and infrastructure show their own defects, but it still exposes the natural vibes. The new blocks and buildings, classrooms and libraries have been developed much better. Wi-Fi facility is average not poor. Hostels are also average but with great food service.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, no problem in academics and faculties. Keep fewer expectations about college programs.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students. Most labs are good and have acceptable facilities. However, the EDC Lab has only a few functioning components (Function generator, CRO). The classroom is a 6/10 - seating is comfortable, but overall, the class and infrastructure are okay. The library is very good (only till 5 PM). Sports and games are highly encouraged in our college. In the college hostel, the food is really good. I have never had any food poisoning experience. Girls can be out only till 7 PM. Bo...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because there are fewer college events and festivals.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi network is available, but the average speed is. Our college provides library facilities. The infrastructure and classroom are fine. It provides all the necessary labs. The college hostel is available from the second year. First-year girl students are accommodated in the college's working women's hostel, where rooms are all a little bit congested. First-year boys have a separate hostel. Food is fine, and it is according to the students menu. The menu gets changed every month. Curfew timing ...

reviews.review_heading: Good in terms of placements, education, infrastructure, and faculty. Events are fewer.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a separate library for Computer Science as well as a central library. A digital library is also available. Labs are also up to the mark and follow the KTU requirements. Our college is known for sports activities, and we have separate clubs for dance, music, literature, technical clubs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Life at nssce family & co.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library, but the lab buildings are too old. Canteen is good enough. In the mens hostel, the food was good. There was good quality Wi-Fi provided by the college management, so we could easily access the internet. There are printing machines in the college, which will be very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: College has a good infrastructure and natural vibe.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good lab facilities, and I am in a private hostel, which has a good study atmosphere and has facilities that are required for students, such as Wi-Fi, a volleyball court, and a wide range of activities for students to relax.

reviews.review_heading: Great and challenging college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was awesome and facilities were good. The classrooms were neat and big with comfortable benches. Labs were good with air conditioning. The library was also good. Wi-Fi facility was available. The campus provided hotel facilities for both boys and girls. The canteen food was good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi was available in the college but did not work properly sometimes. Library was available on the college campus. The facilities were good. Limited sports facilities and basic medical facilities were available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are no good facilities and no Wi-Fi. It does not have good facilities in labs. Classrooms are not clean. The hostel food is below average. It is not encouraging in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: A good choice if you are looking for a college to make some memories.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite average, which is expected from an aided college. I am a day scholar, so I don't know much about the hostel, but I have heard that it is just average. When it comes to the canteen, medical facilities, sports, games, and events, they are quite impressive, especially the puffs at the canteen if you go there around 10:50 or 11 AM.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good placements and the quality of teaching.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available here. The quality of hostel food is just okay. Good engagement in sports activities is also there. The food in canteen is good but a little expensive. The classrooms, libraries, etc., are really amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement opportunities, good atmosphere .
reviews.review_text: Every department gets its own laboratory facilities, department library, and a common central library. Laboratories were equipped and well-maintained. The only drawback is that some lab roofs are made of metal sheets, so in summer, it is very difficult to work there. The temperature rises up to 45 degrees in Palakkad during summer. The college has a common canteen, ladies and men's hostels, and separate hostels for freshers and seniors. The food and accommodation are decent.

reviews_list.review_title: Mahatma Gandhi institute of technology college review.

review_content.Placements: 83% of students are placed in Electrical and Electronic Engineering. In my EEE course, the highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 4.5 LPA, and the average package is 7.5 LPA. In my college and in my ECE course, top recruiting companies are Intel India, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments, Broadcom, NXP Semiconductors, MediaTek, Micron, Samsung Semiconductor, and AMD. In my course, the offered roles are embedded software engineer, IoT engineer, firmware developer, control systems engineer, automation engineer, and R&D engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good and comfortable, and the infrastructure of my college is very good and well-maintained. In my course of EEE, classrooms are maintained and cleaned every day. In my hostel, water and electricity are available 24 hours, and the quality of food is good. In the mess, hygienic food is available, and there is a hospital on campus. Sports facilities are good, and an indoor stadium is available at my college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Placements are average, according to me. As there is a great demand for artificial intelligence, there are no proper placements for CSE. But for other groups, there are many chances to get placements compared with CSE. This is what I feel by seeing the placements in my college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. We have a library, playground, and good classrooms too. In college, there are lots of trees with pleasent atmosphere. The environment of the college is quite peaceful. The classrooms are large with enough benches for children and proper ventilation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the placements and infrastructure.

The top recruiting companies are Cognizant, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, JP Morgan, and Cisco.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers robust facilities, which include extensive IT infrastructure, well-equipped labs, a large digital library with many resources. The hostel facilities are good, which are separate for both boys and girls with a medical center. The campus usually has power backup also.

description: MGIT cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the MGIT TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

MGIT TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 5280 and 38821 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing ra

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 5280, 5862 and 6313, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to MGIT. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.
