hostel_campus.college_name: MGIT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. We have a library, playground, and good classrooms too. In college, there are lots of trees with pleasent atmosphere. The environment of the college is quite peaceful. The classrooms are large with enough benches for children and proper ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers robust facilities, which include extensive IT infrastructure, well-equipped labs, a large digital library with many resources. The hostel facilities are good, which are separate for both boys and girls with a medical center. The campus usually has power backup also.

reviews.review_heading: Mahatma Gandhi institute of technology college review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and comfortable, and the infrastructure of my college is very good and well-maintained. In my course of EEE, classrooms are maintained and cleaned every day. In my hostel, water and electricity are available 24 hours, and the quality of food is good. In the mess, hygienic food is available, and there is a hospital on campus. Sports facilities are good, and an indoor stadium is available at my college.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for enjoyment and fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty decent, with clean washrooms. Lab facilities are good but can be a little better. Library is worth it to study and upskill. Some Classrooms lack the required number of fans. Hostel facilities are not bad. Mess food is better than any other hostel's. Sports facilities are better.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus life but not with the placement.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are decent with projectors, and the labs are pretty well maintained. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and the library is somewhat congested but contains all the books. Hostels are outside the campus, and during lunch break, the college bus is available to go to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A little bit overpriced. Placements and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent in terms of land space, and we have very big labs. Here in MGIT, we also have two grounds. Canteen is very small. You can also find a fast food center and juice point in the college. You can also see different kinds of plants across the campus.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and satisfactory because of the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities are good and comfortable, and the infrastructure of my college is very good and well-maintained. In my course of EEE, classrooms are maintained and cleaned every day. In my hostel, water and electricity are available 24 hours, and the quality of food is good. In the mess, hygienic food is available, and there is a hospital on campus. Sports facilities are good, and an indoor stadium is available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: A college with great freedom.
reviews.review_text: Every class has projects, and every department has its particular labs. Classrooms have more than enough space. The canteen has almost every type of food, very cost-friendly, the college encourages sports, and an indoor sports room and gym are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placements and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities were good and comfortable. The infrastructure of my college was good, and the maintenance was good. In my course of ECE, I maintain excellent grades, and my classrooms were maintained cleanly, and it was cleaned every day. In my hostel, the food and the maintenance were good, and water and electricity were available at any time. The quality of food was also good, and the maintenance was hygienic, and it has a health center in my college that provides a doctor and ta...

reviews.review_heading: Good life experience and a few courses are interesting, and a few faculty members are too good.
reviews.review_text: It has been 28 days since MGIT was constructed. Compared to the recent college infrastructure. MGIT has some golden architecture, yet it is strong. MGIT is such a green and eco-friendly college. Even though it has golden architecture, it has a good base withstanding heat, rain, and wind for 28 days till today.

reviews.review_heading: If you are getting a scholarship, this is a good college.
reviews.review_text: I dont know about the hostel as I am a day scholar, but coming to our course, 1st sem, 3rd sem, and 4th sem faculty are great, and I dont think 2nd sem and 5th sem faculty are that great because they are new to teaching, even though we have experienced faculty, some new faculty are given to explain to seniors.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledge is power, it is in the MGIT.
reviews.review_text: The labs and library are very good to see and learn from. There are many systems and books. We can easily achieve knowledge from it. The hostel was very collaborative with friends and classmates. The food is awesome. And good to eat. Well-equipped labs, digital classrooms, and comfortable hostels with good facilities supported our learning journey.

reviews.review_heading: It has good staff and learning. The campus life is good and not so restricted as other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college area is spread over 30 acres of land. The hostel is very good with well-maintained rules and good security. The food served is better than PG hostels. The security will not send outside until we get permission from parents. They will take attendance at night in each room.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: All are good and effective. The quality of food is high. The neatness in the mess and rooms of the hostel is clean. Hostel accommodation has separate blocks for juniors and seniors, with a focus on a serene environment and good play and study areas. That was the best hostel I have ever stayed in.

reviews.review_heading: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure is placed in my college. We have all the subject labs and nice classrooms here. We have 24-hour Wi-Fi available. We have a well-stocked library. We have a digital computer lab. We have medical facilities and canteens for both hostelers and day boarders.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Cognizant, HCL, TCS, Siemens, Microsoft, Capgemini, etc., visit our college to hire students.
Students also get placed in various non-tech companies like EXL, Axtriya, ZS Associates, Brain and Company, BCG, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology offers median package range of (aprx)INR 500,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 4.5 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the KMIT programmes is around INR 1,00,000 to 4,12,000.

faqs.answer: A:    TS EAMCET Counselling fee for OBC category candidates is INR 1200 and for Scheduled Caste (SC)/ Scheduled Tribe (ST) Category is INR 600. CMR College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. reviews_list.review_title: If you comprise campus life, you can join this college.

review_content.Placements: In our college 90 to 100 percent students get placed and there is an option if you are not placed till end of the 4th year, you can talk to management if you interested they will train you till get the, I do not know fees about this, it would less or zero, top companies like Sales Force, service now, Amazon, Wipro, TCS, less people get internships from the college, mostly of them get by applying outside, all kind of roles are being hire, if you are rightly skillful for that role.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for KMIT, and there is no college bus for KMIT. You should travel on your own, and if you are far, you should stay in private hostels which are near the campus. Some are good and some are really bad hostels. Canteen food is quite good and there is no non veg in canteen. You can order from outside, the price of canteen is reasonable, not too costly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges for CSE with excellent placements and supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: KMIT provides good placement opportunities for students in CSE. The college has good connections with various industries. Companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Accenture, Capgemini, and product-based startups come every year. The training for placements starts quite early. It includes aptitude tests, coding practice, and sessions on soft skills. All these really help the students in developing their skills. The average salary package comes out to be pretty decent. Many students end up getting more than one job. The placement team is very supportive. They guide everyone step by step throughout the entire process.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.
faqs.question: Q: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?

faqs.answer: Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling process is ongoing. TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 Counselling are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official webiste of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in. To be conducted in three phases TS EAMCET 2025 Phase 2 Counselling process began in July, whereas the Final Phase counselling process will begin August. Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

review_summary.college_name: KMIT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely fit for you if you got a 6,000-8,000 rank in EAMCET.

content.Placements: I am in the 2022-2026 batch, placements are going on now. Placements are good, but fewer compared to our seniors. Companies like Ryan, Darwin Box, Eventbrite, Incircles, Epam, Virtusa, NCR, Salesforce, Nasuni, Cognizant, Nitro Games, Sanofi, and some other small companies offered placement.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided for every classroom, which is a private network, and a hostel is not available for this college as it is located in the centre of the city. The library is good, the labs are good, and the classrooms are very nice, you will feel like you are sitting in a round table discussion.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A place where coding begins from the beginning.

content.Placements: Total placed students are 565, with a placement percentage of 96.58 percent. The number of offers is 709, and 143 companies visited the campus. The average salary is 9.74 LPA, and the highest package is 49.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and others like Wipro, TCS, and Infosys. Top roles offered are software engineer, data scientist, cloud engineer, and AI/ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility, so we can live in nearby PGs. The canteen food is very good, especially the idly sambar. Everybody needs their own laptops, as they want everyone to do hands-on projects, not only during lab time. This is really helpful because it helps us grow from the first year itself.

content.Placements: In our college 90 to 100 percent students get placed and there is an option if you are not placed till end of the 4th year, you can talk to management if you interested they will train you till get the, I do not know fees about this, it would less or zero, top companies like Sales Force, service now, Amazon, Wipro, TCS, less people get internships from the college, mostly of them get by applying outside, all kind of roles are being hire, if you are rightly skillful for that role.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for KMIT, and there is no college bus for KMIT. You should travel on your own, and if you are far, you should stay in private hostels which are near the campus. Some are good and some are really bad hostels. Canteen food is quite good and there is no non veg in canteen. You can order from outside, the price of canteen is reasonable, not too costly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges for CSE with excellent placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: KMIT provides good placement opportunities for students in CSE. The college has good connections with various industries. Companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Accenture, Capgemini, and product-based startups come every year. The training for placements starts quite early. It includes aptitude tests, coding practice, and sessions on soft skills. All these really help the students in developing their skills. The average salary package comes out to be pretty decent. Many students end up getting more than one job. The placement team is very supportive. They guide everyone step by step throughout the entire process.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you are interested in coding, this college helps you a lot.

content.Placements: In my college, placements are good compared to other colleges, with about 90 to 95% placed every year. Top recruiting companies are Salesforce, ServiceNow, Wipro, Infosys. Mainly, they come here for web development, and some companies are based on AI/ML. Almost all kinds of roles are offered in college based on their capabilities. The highest is 1.2 CR, from 3-2 companies for internships and jobs; average students get internships, mostly free internships. Overall, according to placements, it gives nice opportunities for students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure has developed as compared to when I joined the college three years ago, quite good infrastructure. For every course, there is infrastructure available. There is no hostel, only a canteen. Canteen is pure veg; it provides decent food at low prices, quality is good, and the faculty also eat there. Medical facility, I am unaware of. Sports and games are less prioritized in KMIT, but if you are a professional or play a good game, you will be encouraged to participate in tournaments, no doubt in that.

faqs.question: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?
faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.

faqs.question: How can I get into Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.

faqs.question: What is TS EAMCET 2025 Counselling schedule?
faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling process is ongoing. TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 Counselling are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official webiste of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in.To be conducted in three phases TS EAMCET 2025 Phase 2 Counselling process began inJuly, whereas the Final Phase counselling process will beginAugust. Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

description: KMIT cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

KMIT TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 4512 and 4835 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 3859. For other B.E. /

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top two most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 4512 and 4835, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to KMIT. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The KMIT MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 1984. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 2958, and the 2023 cutoff was 5137 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: KMIT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely fit for you if you got a 6,000-8,000 rank in EAMCET.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided for every classroom, which is a private network, and a hostel is not available for this college as it is located in the centre of the city. The library is good, the labs are good, and the classrooms are very nice, you will feel like you are sitting in a round table discussion.

reviews.review_heading: A place where coding begins from the beginning.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility, so we can live in nearby PGs. The canteen food is very good, especially the idly sambar. Everybody needs their own laptops, as they want everyone to do hands-on projects, not only during lab time. This is really helpful because it helps us grow from the first year itself.

reviews.review_heading: If you comprise campus life, you can join this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for KMIT, and there is no college bus for KMIT. You should travel on your own, and if you are far, you should stay in private hostels which are near the campus. Some are good and some are really bad hostels. Canteen food is quite good and there is no non veg in canteen. You can order from outside, the price of canteen is reasonable, not too costly.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for CSE with excellent placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: KMIT is a neat and updated campus that remains well-maintained. It contains all the essentials required for pursuing an engineering course. Classrooms are projector-enabled, with comfortable seating and proper ventilation. Laboratories are fully equipped with new computers and good internet connectivity. Thus, coding and projects can be managed easily. The library is sufficiently spacious, filled with lots of books, helpful references, and space to read quietly. Wi-Fi connectivity extends throug...

reviews.review_heading: If you are interested in coding, this college helps you a lot.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure has developed as compared to when I joined the college three years ago, quite good infrastructure. For every course, there is infrastructure available. There is no hostel, only a canteen. Canteen is pure veg; it provides decent food at low prices, quality is good, and the faculty also eat there. Medical facility, I am unaware of. Sports and games are less prioritized in KMIT, but if you are a professional or play a good game, you will be encouraged to participate in tournaments, n...

reviews.review_heading: The college focuses on creativity, spirit, knowledge building, ethics, and performance in students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are moderate. I would rate them as 7 out of 10. They provide everything, including college systems. There is no hostel for this college. But the food is of better quality. I would rate it 4.5 out of 5. Sports and games, they won't show much interest in that. But those who are interested can participate.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied and college life. Everything is strict. They doesn't have hostel so disturbing.
reviews.review_text: I can say that some of my facilities are good and others are too bad that they have certain knowledge about the subject but they can't explain properly. The infrastructure is bad. The computers are not working well. They have so many kinds of rules against it. It is a big problem in my college that there is no hostel kind of thing in college. College is not so big. In canteen, they don't even feed non-veg. I want to say build a proper hostel to maintain the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the faculty but it has decent and good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a decent and neat infrastructure but it is not that equipped. It provides decent qualities of systems and equipments like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. Our college has no hostel facility since it is in the middle of the city. It does not have much space, and it also has transport facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and has fabulous faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is awesome. Classrooms are in good condition, and the computer labs are in good condition with Wi-Fi connectivity. The library is big, and there are many books. The hostel facilities are separate hostels for boys and girls. The sports facilities are good. There is a canteen where you can buy some snacks.

reviews.review_heading: KMIT - A perfect blend of learning, opportunities, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure and facilities that support both academic and co-curricular development. Library is well stocked with textbooks and reference materials which help the students in studying. The classrooms are equipped with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, modern labs, and great exposure for IT students at KMIT.
reviews.review_text: IT department has well-equipped labs with high-speed internet, modern systems, and access to platforms like GitHub and AWS educated. Classrooms are clean, air-conditioned, and have smart boards. The library is spacious with a good collection of tech books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: Best for those who are interested in coding, and college will support self learning.
reviews.review_text: Labs are being upgraded, and every system works fine. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are also quite good. If you are top student, you get a nice classroom. Sports and games are less. Canteen is small and food is average. There is no hostel on campus and no bus to campus. Private hostels are available near college, but they are not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: My review of the Keshav Memorial.
reviews.review_text: College does not provide hostel facilities, but near college, there are many private hostels. Coming to infrastructure, it can be considered moderate. College provides canteen facilities, and the food is slightly better. College does not support playing sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: A college that provides good opportunities for coders, but is definitely behind in terms of campus.
reviews.review_text: College provides its own wi-fi that connect only to the lab equipment, while it does not provide internet in general. The labs are adequate, we observed issues with the systems from time to time. Classrooms are average since the building is quite old, however there is a projector facility arranged in many classrooms. Library is somewhat small for a college of such reputation, wish there were more collections of technical books apart from the same old. There is no hostel facility in our campus al...

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience at KMIT.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility in our college, as it is located in the center of the city, Narayanguda. There are many hostels near the college for the students who hail from other towns or cities. College has an above average infrastructure with a good amount of labs and available Wi-Fi.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya:

college_info.intro:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers courses at the UG, PG, and Diploma levels. Wherein, courses such as BTech, BSc, and BDes are most popular among the candidates to pursue. The Institute offers BTech on the basis of Class 12 aggregate of 45% with valid scores of JEE Main. The total tuition fees of BTech at SVVV ranges from INR 3.1 Lakh to INR 5.4 Lakh.
Whereas, it offers BSc at a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 with qualification of institutional level examination. The Institute offers BSc at a total tuition fees ranging from INR 76.5 K to INR 2.2 Lakh. BDes on the other hand is offered on the basis of 45% to 50% Class 12 aggregate with JEE Main qualification. The tuition fees of BDes ranges around INR 2.2 Lakh to INR 2.5 Lakh. The duration of these courses vary from 3 years to 6 years. For more details around Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya popular programmes, check out the table below:

faqs.question: How are the placements at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers and courses across various streams, namely, Engineering, Science and IT and Software among others. The University offers respective courses with duration varying from 3 years to 6 years. The SVVV fee structure includes total tuition fees ranging from INR 15.25 K to INR 5.44 Lakh.

Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of minimum aggregate secured in Class 12 and , depending on the level of the course. Furthermore, the University offers respective courses through various constituent institutes. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, SVET, and many more. For more details around Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya courses, fees, and eligibility, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who manage to secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 for the admission to UG level courses stand eligible for admission to Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya. Similarly, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT, ATMA and other equivalent exams to secure the final admission to the respective courses. Furthermore, candidates must meet the cutoff rank or score to be eligible through the accepted entrance exams. The final selection post entrance exams include counselling, and personal interviews. Candidates must qualify all the selection rounds to secure a seat at the University.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college with average facilities, but the wildlife is good, and there is a lake behind it.

content.Placements: Placements are average here, but if you're skill-wise good and maintain nice scores over the semesters, then there's a 20-30% chance you'll land a high placement. Top recruiting companies here in the B.Tech department include Impetus, Accenture, TCS, Yash Technologies, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The old/main buildings here are average and poorly maintained, but the newer buildings are really nice and look good. The campus is moderate in area; there is a basketball court, a lot of sports available, the canteen is nice, and there's a garden in front of the main block. The downside is that if you choose B. Tech, you'll be allotted the older blocks where they rarely clean, and some of the classrooms are disorganized and dirty, just like the kids there. A plus point is that a lot of dogs, cats, and birds roam around the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college has very good placement under DAVV.

content.Placements: The lowest package offered is 2 LPA and the highest is 8 LPA. Many students get internships. You cannot do anything before the 8th semester if you get a job, leave it just because of attendance. TCS also blacklists our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not working most of the time. They also use a new blocker, we cannot even utilize our time. The canteen is good, but there is no time for students to eat. Even if students are not good, they do make out in public, just fight and all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: According to this campus, it is worth taking admission in it.

content.Placements: As a final year student, our college is offering free placement training and helping us to build our career by providing us with internships and seminars. They offer so many internships of different types, it's up to you which one you want to join. They also offer internships in NGOs.
content.Infrastructure: Every department has its own building, which allows smooth functioning, and every department has its own service room for handling CCTVs and systems. There is a separate free library that consists of all the subjects and other general knowledge books, and so on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college. Overall rating of the college is good. .

content.Placements: The placement percentage varies by department. For core engineering branches like CSE, IT, and ECE, the placement rate is decent. Around 70%-80% of students get placed if they have good grades and skills. For non-core branches like civil or mechanical, the placements are comparatively lower.
content.Infrastructure: The SVVV campus is spacious and well-maintained. It has modern buildings and decent green space. The atmosphere is calm, and the campus is located near the heart of Indore city, so connectivity is good. Classrooms are mostly clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Smart classrooms are available in some departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured curriculum with scope for practical exposure.

content.Placements: Around 70-75 percent of students from our batch are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is approximately 10 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is around 4.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiters included companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Cognizant. A fair number of students (about 60 percent) got internships, mainly from startups and mid-size IT firms, with some landing opportunities through platforms like Internshala and LinkedIn. The most common roles offered are software developer, QA tester, business analyst, and support engineer.

admission_overview.description: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya admissions 2025 is a mix of entrance exam scores/merit-based as per the course requirements. The university offers BTech, BDes, MBA, MTech, etc. at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD and Diploma courses. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams, such as Engineering, Design, Management, etc. The application process at the Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about the SVVV course admissions 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers various courses at the UG, PG, PhD and Diploma levels. Applicants who have not appeared in any entrance
test need to appear in the Shri Vaishnav Entrance Test for admission against vacancies. For PhD course admission, aspirants must appear for the SVET. Those candidates who have passed the NET/SET/GATE or any other equivalent National Test are exempted from the Entrance Test. However, such candidates shall have to go through the Interview Process. admission_process.title: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Application Process 2025

The application mode is an online procedure. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website,https://admission.svvv.edu.in/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as CAT/MAT/XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/JEE Main, etc, for admission to the MBA, BTech among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theShri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking for course admission at IShri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. For UG courses candidates must pass Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG programmes. The institute offers more than 10 courses in various streams, such as Engineering, Design, Management, etc. The selection criteria for all courses are merit and entrance based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers more than 10 courses in various streams, such as Engineering, Design, Management, etc. Students can check the table below to know course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:Course NameCommon EligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects (40% for s in the case of SC /ST/OBC)JEE or any other entrance test + PIBDesClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects (40% for s in the case of SC /ST/OBC)JEE or any other entrance test + PIBSc (Hons)Class 12 in the Science stream with a 50% aggregateMP Pre Agriculture Test/Shri Vaishnav Entrance TestMBAGraduate with at least 50% aggregate (45% for the reserve category)CAT/MAT/XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ SVETPhDPG degree with a 55% aggregateNET/SET/GATE or any other equivalent NationalTest/SCETMTechBE/BTechGATE/SCET

faqs.question: How easy is it to survive at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya if you are from a different state or background?
faqs.answer: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers a safe and inclusive environment. It is comparatively easy to adjust with the environment, among the peers. There is no language barrier as such. Students get to experience diversity and inclusivity that the faculty and peers have to offer. Located in Madhya Pradesh, candidates coming from south might find it difficult to adjust, given the language difference and other lifestyle alterations.

faqs.question: Who are eligible for Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Candidates who manage to secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 for the admission to UG level courses stand eligible for admission to Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya. Similarly, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT, ATMA and other equivalent exams to secure the final admission to the respective courses. Furthermore, candidates must meet the cutoff rank or score to be eligible through the accepted entrance exams. The final selection post entrance exams include counselling, and personal interviews. Candidates must qualify all the selection rounds to secure a seat at the University.

highlights.description: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #44 by the Outlook 2025 under the State Private University category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2025, Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya climbed 2 ranks to #44 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average college with average facilities, but the wildlife is good, and there is a lake behind it.
reviews.review_text: The old/main buildings here are average and poorly maintained, but the newer buildings are really nice and look good. The campus is moderate in area; there is a basketball court, a lot of sports available, the canteen is nice, and there's a garden in front of the main block. The downside is that if you choose B. Tech, you'll be allotted the older blocks where they rarely clean, and some of the classrooms are disorganized and dirty, just like the kids there. A plus point is that a lot of dogs, ca...

reviews.review_heading: My college has very good placement under DAVV.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working most of the time. They also use a new blocker, we cannot even utilize our time. The canteen is good, but there is no time for students to eat. Even if students are not good, they do make out in public, just fight and all.

reviews.review_heading: According to this campus, it is worth taking admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Every department has its own building, which allows smooth functioning, and every department has its own service room for handling CCTVs and systems. There is a separate free library that consists of all the subjects and other general knowledge books, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Overall rating of the college is good. .
reviews.review_text: The SVVV campus is spacious and well-maintained. It has modern buildings and decent green space. The atmosphere is calm, and the campus is located near the heart of Indore city, so connectivity is good. Classrooms are mostly clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Smart classrooms are available in some departments.

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured curriculum with scope for practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is decent. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors. The department has good Wi-Fi connectivity and well-maintained computer labs. Library is stocked with relevant academic resources and is a quiet place for self-study. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are manageable, and the mess food is decent, though repetitive. The hostel has medical facilities and basic sports equipment, but more recreational areas could be added. Overall, the infrastructure mee...

reviews.review_heading: My college life at SVVV, Indore.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the infrastructure 4 out of 5. Classrooms were well-equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs had the essential systems and software needed for practical work. Library was spacious and quiet. It had a good collection of books. Campus also had basic medical facilities. Sports grounds and game facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Students can come here to study and enjoy their college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course and hostels is very nice. Even the infrastructure of the college is very nice. Hostels have facilities like Wi-Fi and water coolers. Even the college has an Apple lab. The college provides a personal Wi-Fi server for each student.

reviews.review_heading: I am 100% satisfied with the good quality education provided by it.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very nice. Hostels are very reliable for students with good Wi-Fi facilities. It also provides a canteen and mess for daily breakfast in month and dinner. The college infrastructure is based on modern architecture and is very attractive.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty. It is good in studies. The canteen food is not hygienic enough.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good for courses. Wi-Fi is good, and labs are very good. Departments are also very good. The quality of the hostel is good like food and tables. AC is good. The canteen is not hygienic so much. Sports and games are played in college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good with this fee and all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and the new building is very good. After the paint and a little change, it looks too good. The canteen is very hygienic. The library is too big with the best facilities. Classrooms are also good. The cleanliness is also maintained.

reviews.review_heading: An absolute complete college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained with a modern campus which is essential for a smooth academic journey. The buildings are spacious. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. It enhances the learning experience. Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus ensures that students can study and collaborate online. The labs are also well-equipped, especially in our department with high-speed internet, updated systems (both Windows and Mac OS), and dedicated staff. The college...

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements and course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available all around the campus and is free to use. Labs and classrooms are nice, well neat and clean library as well.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and educational environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is too fast and all the other are very clean and managed. There are 2 libraries in my college. The food quality offered in the hostel and mess is 4 out of 5, and the medical facility is also 4 out of 5. For sports and games, colleges also provide extra services.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are very spacious and ventilated classrooms in which 60 students can be fit in very easily. The labs are very clean. They are filled with good quality computers and desktops. The canteen is really good and I think the kachori is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have a big campus and good infrastructure. The food served served in the mess and canteen is good. They organise sports events.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya

college_info.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, SVVV offers scholarship to physically challeneged students. Ten Scholarships equivalent to 50% of Annual Tuition Fee or INR 50,000 only, whichever is less, will be awarded to the students who have more than 40% physical disability (certified by competent medical authority of the state government). The Scholarship will be awarded to only those students who are selected on merit. The Scholarship will stop if a student gets ATKT at any stage of the programme. A student will not be eligible to avail more than one Scholarship of the university at any given time.

faqs.answer:
A:    Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognized by UGC or AIU.

review_summary.college_name: Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My review of Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies.

content.Placements: More than 50% students from DIEMS got placed last year from all over the branches. The placement record of the institute has been consistently improving every year. The highest package offer was around 8 LPA, the average package was 4-5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5-3 LPA. Several reputed companies visit our campus for recruitment drives. The top companies include Infosys, TCS, Persistent, Cognizant, Wipro, RedHat, Tech Mahindra and Capgemini. In addition to this, around 60% students got internships at well-known companies. The top roles offered to students include positions like Software Developer, Software Engineer, Web Developer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Aurangabad for placements, events, and facilities.

content.Placements: College placements are the best. It invites a lot of companies for recruitments like Tata Motors, Infosys, Byju's, etc. The placement cell is also good for students. The average package of college ranges from 4-7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: A 5-floor building is well-organised with each separate department. A library is provided with more than 1 lakh books of academics and others. There is a workshop for practice. Computer labs are available. There is a sports area for sports students. A huge campus is also available.

content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are very good. The food is also healthy as well as hygienic. Cleanliness is maintained through days and nights. The quality of facilities is also good in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: About 25% to 40% of the students from my branch got the placements. The highest package is 19 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Recruiting companies are Capgemini, Cognizant, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, all the labs needed for the electronics and telecommunication branch are available. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Library is also there with more than 1000 books. Classrooms are well furnished but there is no AC. There is no special mess in college.

paragraphs: Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. hostel_campus.college_name: Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My review of Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The CSE and AIML departments are equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities to support academic and practical learning. The department has a well-classroom. The student also has access to the digital library as well as the normal library. Hostel facilities are comfortable, and the girls' hostel is on the campus itself, with a closing time of 7 pm.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Aurangabad for placements, events, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: A 5-floor building is well-organised with each separate department. A library is provided with more than 1 lakh books of academics and others. There is a workshop for practice. Computer labs are available. There is a sports area for sports students. A huge campus is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are very good. The food is also healthy as well as hygienic. Cleanliness is maintained through days and nights. The quality of facilities is also good in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure about course is very good. The quality is also good and the Wi-Fi in our lab is also good. There were no disturbance occurance for Wi-Fi but they should update their windows system at a time. The hostel is  very good and the cleaning in the hostel is also maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, all the labs needed for the electronics and telecommunication branch are available. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Library is also there with more than 1000 books. Classrooms are well furnished but there is no AC. There is no special mess in college.

reviews.review_heading: I am thankful that I got to study here because of the amazing campus, environment, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: My college has well-equipped laboratories for all the required technologies and skills students need to acquire. We have highly qualified faculties with impeccable experience and teaching skills. Faculty members are friendly in nature and are always on their feet to help students. We also have facilities like a library, playground, lunch hall, parking, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A good college in our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well designed. Even the hostels are pretty good. The girls' hostel is located on the campus itself and is very secure. The mess is in the hostel building itself. The college has Wi-Fi and also a library, which is open 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi for students and has NABA-accredited labs. The classrooms are healthy and the environment is fresh. The library has thousands of books, and the reading hall is very big. The hostel is decent, and the canteen is okay. The college also conducts sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: I am not a part of the college hostel. I know about the hostel infrastructure because some of my friends are there in a hostel, and they told me the infrastructure of the hostel is very bad. The water supply in the hostel is very minimal, and students are very frustrated because of it.

reviews.review_heading: A college with decent placements and good hostel facility.
reviews.review_text: Our college includes Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, along with a gym, store, and mess facilities. Quality of food is good. Canteen facility is also available, and there is an in-house stationery store for students, which offers all the necessary stationery materials.

reviews.review_heading: In the college, admission is based on the MHT CET examination.
reviews.review_text: The annual fest named QUASARS was conducted in the months of January or February, usually! It used to be conducted on the college ground at a grand level! Sports and all other activities were also included. Prizes were distributed as per academic and extracurricular performance! Tech fests were conducted in the month of September right before the 2nd sem exams to brainstorm with students and give them recognition in the institute! I was not at all happy with my library facility! We were provided...

reviews.review_heading: They should focus on placement for the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor, drinking water is not available, the washrooms are of poor quality, and the labs are very poor. In fact, there are no dedicated labs; everything is just adjusted here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities at our college are commendable. We have large labs for each specific department, along with extensive sports grounds and a workshop where students can work on their projects. The college hostels are also well-maintained, accommodating both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good. It has a big campus.
reviews.review_text: This college has the best facilities. There are lots of Wi-Fi connections, various labs, big classrooms, and lots of libraries, including a book library, a motivation book library, a chemistry lab, a mechanics lab, and more. The mess and canteen have good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: The atmosphere in my college is good and it is greenery everywhere.
reviews.review_text: QUASARS, an annual festival, was usually held in January or February. It used to be conducted on the college grounds at a grand level! Sports and all other activities were also included. Prizes were distributed as per academic and extracurricular performance. Tech fests were conducted in the month of September, right before 2nd semester exams, to brainstorm with students and give them recognition in the institute. I was not at all happy with my library facility. We were provided with course book...

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at IIIT Raichur are BTech and PhD. The college offers these programmes to students at UG and doctoral levels. Further, the college offers a BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. The college offers this programme across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, etc. IIITR is planning to launch a few more courses soon to provide all options for higher education, research, and innovation. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied bacuse of Everything, bad placements, bad infrastructure, bad Campus life.

review_content.Placements: I am a 2024 passout, and as per the year, not even a single student got placed in any company. The college is showing old data on placements and claiming that its average package is around 18 LPA, but that's fake. Even the year before, only 5-6 students got placed, and they calculated the average between those 5 only, neglecting all others who were not placed. Internships were also nonexistent. The college is not helping any students with placements; in fact, the college does not have a placement officer, and the director says it is not their duty to get students placed. It is the worst college I have ever heard of.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This college is not for beginners, but in future it would be amazing.

review_content.Placements: Placement is very bad. In my batch, no one was selected. Because the placement cell is not working properly. We don't have a proper body to be placed in, and colleges don't think much about it. One more reason is that, due to the recession, companies didn't visit our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Course curriculum is okay, but there are still a few courses they offer that are not necessary. So they should work on it. Hostel facilities are not good enough. In hostels, we face internet issues most of the time. If some equipment is damaged, then it will take a long time to repair it.

faqs.answer: After the JEE Main 2024 Session 1 results, candidates should first check their results on the official JEE Main website using their application number and date of birth. The scorecard will provide detailed information such as total marks, percentile score, All India Rank (AIR), category, cutoff marks, and qualifying status. Understanding your score is crucial, as the marks represent your total score obtained in the exam, and the AIR shows your performance relative to other candidates. Based on the results, you can plan your next steps, which include applying for admission to NITs, IIITs, and other participating institutes. Qualified candidates are eligible to participate in counseling processes like JoSAA and CSAB for seat allocation. If you're looking to improve your scores, consider appearing for the JEE Main Session 2 exam.Top-ranking candidates may also become eligible for JEE Advanced 2024, which offers admission to IITs. It's important to keep track of important dates for counseling and admissions following the completion of both JEE Main sessions. Stay informed by regularly checking the official JEE Main website for updates on counseling processes, seat allocation, and any related announcements. Ensuring you have all necessary documents ready for counseling and admission procedures is also crucial. Following these steps and staying informed will help you effectively plan your course of action towards securing admission to your desired institutes.
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Raichur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good, but our permanent campus is still not ready.

content.Placements: This is a new course in IIIT Raichur, starting with the 2023 batch. This is the first batch of AI, so there is nothing about placements. The first batch of CSE is pretty good. The average salary package offered is 18 LPA and we hope we can also get better from here and the college will become better.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is average, but we are away from the main campus. It is not built on that campus. The quality of food is pretty good based on what I have heard, hostel food is somewhat nice.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very nice and some are very good in their subject. About the course curriculum, I can't say anything. Exam levels are also good and we also get sufficient time for preparation and also for other things, we get sufficient time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Quality of teaching and placements at this college were satisfactory.

content.Placements: Approximately 60–65% of the students in computer science and engineering get placements at the IIIT Raichur. 5–9 LPA is the average package offered at this college. The top companies that visited this college were TCS, Flipkart, Amazon, Wipro, Infosys, SALT, etc. For the placements in our course, the top roles offered in this course were software engineer, software developer, web engineer, front-end developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: IIIT Raichur has a really good infrastructure for the CSE course. The college has good-quality facilities for the students. The college provides all kinds of facilities to improve students learning. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, etc. facilities available on the college campus. The college has hostel facilities for the students. The food in the mess was made with proper hygiene and good taste.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024

content.Placements: I am a 2024 passout, and as per the year, not even a single student got placed in any company. The college is showing old data on placements and claiming that its average package is around 18 LPA, but that's fake. Even the year before, only 5-6 students got placed, and they calculated the average between those 5 only, neglecting all others who were not placed. Internships were also nonexistent. The college is not helping any students with placements; in fact, the college does not have a placement officer, and the director says it is not their duty to get students placed. It is the worst college I have ever heard of.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is not for beginners, but in future it would be amazing.

content.Placements: Placement is very bad. In my batch, no one was selected. Because the placement cell is not working properly. We don't have a proper body to be placed in, and colleges don't think much about it. One more reason is that, due to the recession, companies didn't visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Course curriculum is okay, but there are still a few courses they offer that are not necessary. So they should work on it. Hostel facilities are not good enough. In hostels, we face internet issues most of the time. If some equipment is damaged, then it will take a long time to repair it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want to join here, it will be at your own risk.

content.Placements: At 2023, IIIT Raichur had 68% of placements. The highest was 45 LPA. The average was 18 LPA. The top companies include TCS, Jio, Amazon, and Deloitte visited. As of 2024, there were no update. Apart from past pass out batches, the current placement scenario is worse.
content.Infrastructure: In IIIT Raichur, there are four computer labs and one library available. More than two additional computer labs are set to open soon. Wi-Fi is accessible for each student. Three hostels, including Tungabhadra and the Federal Hostel, are available for students. The food is average. Cricket, volleyball, and basketball grounds are present. Students participate in indoor games such as table tennis, badminton, and carrom.

admission_overview.college_name: IIIT Raichur Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_process.title: IIIT Raichur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIT Raichur admission process 2025isentrance-based. The institute accepts applicationsonline. IIT Raichur offerstwo BTechprogrammes which are inComputer Science and Engineering,andMathematics and Computingat theUG level. Students between 10K – 20K rank inJEEMainare expected to get admission to the institute.IIIT Raichuraccepts the final admission for the flagship BTech programme throughJoSAA counselling.

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Raichur, Telangana (IIIT Raichur) started its academic degrees in 2019. As of now, this is thenewest IIITestablished and is under the mentorship of IIT Hyderabad.
Candidates can find details regardingIIIT Raichur course'sminimum eligibility requirement in the table below:
Class 12 with Physics,Mathematicsand Chemistry/ Biology/Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational programmes as compulsory subjects and a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates)
JEE Main+JoSSA
To learn more about BTech courses,DownloadtheIIIT Raichur CSE Curriculum
DownloadMathematics & Computing

IIIT Raichur course fee includes tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel fee, and other components. The Institute reserves the right to revise the fee annually. In case of admission cancellation, full fees will be refunded after deducting the processing charges ofINR 2,500. Coming to the seats, the reserved seats will be filled as per the Government of India rules. The total seat intake andIIIT Raichur tuition feesfor the popular course are mentioned in the table given below:
- Computer Science Engineering
Note:This data is taken from the official website and imay vary.
Check outthe completeIIIT Raichur Fees Structure

IIIT Raichur follows the reservation policy of the Government of India. These reservation seats are available for students belonging to SC, ST, OBC and EWS. The OBC candidates can avail the reservation of 27%. The institute may consider entrance test scores while accepting admission. Find below the seat reservation details at IIIT Raichur:
Note:This data is taken from the official website and imay vary.

IIIT admission criteria are entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on scores in the accepted entrance examination followed by respective selection rounds/counselling. The steps involved in the admission process are explained below:
1.IIIT Raichur Application Process

For IIIT Delhi course admission must visit its official website to apply online. During registration, the contact details must be provided correctly. Moreover, the candidate shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.
Exploreother IITs in India
2. Selection: Release of Cutoff List

After the application process, the institute releases a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply. The selection of candidates to IIIT Raichur's BTech programme is based on theirJEE Mainranks.
3. Counselling

The counselling process is managed and regulated by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority(JoSAA) based on which the candidates are allotted seats. The seat allotment is based on the college cutoff and the candidate's preference for courses and colleges. The registration and choice filling of JoSAA generally begins from the third week of June in online mode.

The seat acceptance(SAF)isINR 35,000for all candidates, andINR 17,500 for SC/ST/OBC/PwDcandidates. The seat acceptance fee, excludingJoSAAprocessing charges ofINR 5000, will be adjusted against the admission fee.
4. Admission Confirmation

After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seat. The partial admission fee(PAF)isINR 45,000for all candidates, andINR20,000 for SC/ST/OBC/PwDcandidates
After paying the partial admission fee on the JoSAA portal, the candidateswho are not participating in CSABSpecial rounds should complete the Institute Registration Process of IIIT Raichur.
Check all BTech specialisations, fees and student reviews.

hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Raichur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but our permanent campus is still not ready.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is average, but we are away from the main campus. It is not built on that campus. The quality of food is pretty good based on what I have heard, hostel food is somewhat nice.

reviews.review_heading: Quality of teaching and placements at this college were satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: IIIT Raichur has a really good infrastructure for the CSE course. The college has good-quality facilities for the students. The college provides all kinds of facilities to improve students learning. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, etc. facilities available on the college campus. The college has hostel facilities for the students. The food in the mess was made with proper hygiene and good taste.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied bacuse of Everything, bad placements, bad infrastructure, bad Campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is as poor as you can imagine. It does not have proper hostels, no proper facilities for entertainment, and even no medical staff in the whole college for students. If they get sick, they have to go to another hospital and get their treatment done with their own money, even though students have paid for medical amenities and medical insurance. Wi-Fi also doesn't work properly, there are no proper computer labs, and there is no AC in the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not for beginners, but in future it would be amazing.
reviews.review_text: Course curriculum is okay, but there are still a few courses they offer that are not necessary. So they should work on it. Hostel facilities are not good enough. In hostels, we face internet issues most of the time. If some equipment is damaged, then it will take a long time to repair it.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to join here, it will be at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: In IIIT Raichur, there are four computer labs and one library available. More than two additional computer labs are set to open soon. Wi-Fi is accessible for each student. Three hostels, including Tungabhadra and the Federal Hostel, are available for students. The food is average. Cricket, volleyball, and basketball grounds are present. Students participate in indoor games such as table tennis, badminton, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life, good placements in 2023, academics are good.
reviews.review_text: Campus Wi-Fi facility is not good. There is low capacity of labs to accommodate students. The classrooms do not have AC in this hot weather region but have smart screens and a very small library with only a few books. Hostel conditions are worse with 7 people in a single room. The mess food is quite good. There is no canteen or medical facility provided by the college. For sports they have volleyball, basketball and a cricket court.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus, infrastructure, good placements and good hostels.
reviews.review_text: We still don't have a permanent campus so the infrastructure and facilities are not great. There are many issues with Wi-Fi as well. There are power cuts often during the class as well. The quality of food, mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games can be improved to a large extent.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Indian institute of technology, Raichur.
reviews.review_text: There is no permanent campus yet; it will take another 2 years until we are in government college. There is no proper place for students; there are no sports, only a few club activities; there are minimum members in a single-boy hostel; hostels are in the worst condition.

reviews.review_heading: College curriculum is very good. Placements are average if you are not at the top.
reviews.review_text: We currently in a transmit campus in GEC. We will be having our own permanent campus in 2024 which is under construction. Hostel is spacious and, food is average, no shops inside the campus, we do have basketball ground and a cricket ground. We have AC in all labs and few classroom. Wi-Fi speed is average, we have library were we get access for only 2 hours since we do not have librarian yet.

reviews.review_heading: As of now, it is okay but by the time we get our permanent campus, it should be better.
reviews.review_text: As of now, we are currently on a temporary campus at IIIT Raichur. The infrastructure of our hostel is good and satisfying. We get 24-hour Wi-Fi connectivity. Mess food is okay, which is balanced between south Indian and north Indian. We do not have personal ground; as of now, we are playing in the grounds of GC Raichur only.

reviews.review_heading: The college does not have their own permanent campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are very poor. We have three labs, which take some time but are generally sufficient. Classroom space is okay, but not all classrooms have AC. AC is important in Raichur because the temperature there is always high. The library is small and there are not many books, so getting books can be difficult at times. The hostel is okay, but it is far away from the main building of the college and the food is not so good; it is the same as other mess. Medical facilities are not as we exp...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Raichur - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college is situated in GEC transmit campus. Wi-Fi should be improved. Our classrooms and library are commendable. The mess and canteen are average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college in terms of infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel facilities are very good as compared to other hostels. They provide us with enough electricity, water and other benefits like Wi-Fi and many sports instruments. Like cricket kit, volleyball ground and many more. And our hostel is best. All the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel are very good but here is one problem. In first year we need to share room with 5 students. Our college provide three course. First is CSE. Second one is mnc and third is aids. All course are very good and curriculum is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent with good study and sports curriculum but campus life is not there
reviews.review_text: Not good not enough space for hostels in one hostel there are 7 students living in one room but academic Blok is kind of decent good enough  there are fans WiFi located everywhere mess is really good in comparison to other colleges canteen is also combined with mess
