review_content.Placements: The placements in my college are average. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The internship opportunities provided by the college are also above average. College has done MOU with foreign countries like Japan. Our college provides free opportunities to learn foreign languages.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college campus has Wi-Fi wherever you go on the college campus you will get a Wi-Fi connection with high speed. Labs are also well maintained. But the computer lab is not maintained, it is very poor sometimes. The system doesn't work sometimes. Keyboard is missing sometimes, the mouse is also missing when you are busy, and sometimes everything is missing. The library in our college is very large, consisting of many books in various fields like MPSC UPSC, and also other reference books related to the all engineering branches offered by our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at this college.

review_content.Placements: In the final year of college, the placement procedure starts because the last semester (6th) of MCA is for internships. It is preferred to do an internship in the same company as the job. You will get various opportunities for your selection in a very good company. Seniors also help you and guide you in your preparations. Approximately every student gets placed till the end of the year. Top MNCs and conglomerates like Tata, Wipro, Amazon, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Infosys visit the campus for placements. You can apply them in the last semester.

review_summary.college_name: Tulsiramji Gaikwad-Patil College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and campus placement. Life is good with education and an exam curriculum.

content.Placements: It's not that much good but above average, I will say. With the highest of 7 LPA to the minimum of 3 LPA, I think it is good for a start. Companies like TCS also come for placement, and teachers guide us on how to build a resume and more.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is good with good food. The day-to-day menu includes non-veg on some days, and the veg food is also good in taste and healthy, much better than other hostels. Even the hostel fees are affordable.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members, campus, and everything. Teachers are friendly.

content.Placements: Students who score 65-85% and above get placed in my course. According to faculty members, the highest salary in the CSE Diploma is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 20,00o per month. I haven't passed yet so I don't know about internships and companies yet. According to my seniors, students who score above 75% got internships, but I don't know in which company.
content.Infrastructure: My college has excellent Wi-Fi connectivity. It has a quiet and big library. It has a clean and hygienic canteen. But classrooms are not good. Even junk foods are made by adding more vegetables. Sports events are held every year. Bus facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The honest review of TGPCET.

content.Placements: The placements in my college are average. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The internship opportunities provided by the college are also above average. College has done MOU with foreign countries like Japan. Our college provides free opportunities to learn foreign languages.
content.Infrastructure: Our college campus has Wi-Fi wherever you go on the college campus you will get a Wi-Fi connection with high speed. Labs are also well maintained. But the computer lab is not maintained, it is very poor sometimes. The system doesn't work sometimes. Keyboard is missing sometimes, the mouse is also missing when you are busy, and sometimes everything is missing. The library in our college is very large, consisting of many books in various fields like MPSC UPSC, and also other reference books related to the all engineering branches offered by our college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My experience at this college.

content.Placements: In the final year of college, the placement procedure starts because the last semester (6th) of MCA is for internships. It is preferred to do an internship in the same company as the job. You will get various opportunities for your selection in a very good company. Seniors also help you and guide you in your preparations. Approximately every student gets placed till the end of the year. Top MNCs and conglomerates like Tata, Wipro, Amazon, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Infosys visit the campus for placements. You can apply them in the last semester.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostel facilities available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: HCL, Wipro, TCS company, and other companies also come to the college for the placement. Training and placement cell every time trying to get the job for every student. They want all students to get placed in higher companies with high packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has Wi-Fi high-speed and central library. Our civil departmental library is also available for students. Students can play games indoors and outdoor activities. They organise events every year.

paragraphs: Gaikwad Patil College Nagpur admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG, PG, and After 10th levels. lists: Gaikwad Patil College Nagpur Fees: The overall tuition fees charged for UG courses range between INR 358,260 - INR 597,150 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 182,608 - INR 205,216. In addition to the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
Gaikwad Patil College Nagpur Course Duration: The duration for UG courses provided by Gaikwad Patil College Nagpur ranges between 4 - 5 years and the same for PG courses is 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at this college.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has Wi-Fi high-speed and central library. Our civil departmental library is also available for students. Students can play games indoors and outdoor activities. They organise events every year.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of TGPCET Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is a Wi-Fi campus. Wherever you go on our campus, you will get a Wi-Fi connection with good-speed internet. Our library is also large, with a lot of books in various categories, such as MPSC, UPSC, GATE, and other engineering-related books.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in this college. Wi-Fi is very strong and high-speed. Classrooms are very good and neat. The mess and canteen are not very good but still, it is clean. The food has a good taste. Medical facilities are a little bit weak.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Tulsiramji Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering and Technology, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The college library, lab, and the infrastructure are decent. Sports facilities are available, and the grounds are well maintained. I haven't opted for the hostel, but as much as I heard from my friends, the hostel is fab and the food is also great. They even said that their hostel is better than the college. The hostel has a large campus with sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are very old and slow.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and Wi-Fi is available anywhere, but not in the garden or ground area. Labs and classrooms are very normal. The library is very good. The department is not well, and the college campus has no parking area. The main building has no lift, and no water purifier machines.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory placement, but the campus and hostel are the best. Overall, a good college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is the best in engineering. Our college has built new hostels for both boys and girls. The best part about the hostel is that it is just 3 km from the campus and near the market. The hostels are good, and mess facilities are proper with tasty food. Sports facilities are the best, and our college participates in many college sports events. College classrooms are good, but many rooms are non-AC. The library is on campus and also available online.

reviews.review_heading: Good in terms of infrastructure and hostel.
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers three categories of rooms: general, VIP, and VVIP. The general category is for students who can't pay all the fees at once, so they can pay the amount every month. In each room, there are four or five students, each with their own B.Ed bathroom (with hot water) and toilets. The VIP room has four students with comfortable beds with mattresses, a wardrobe, and a cupboard.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tulsiramji Gaikwad-Patil College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is not very huge. It is small. There is only one cafeteria on the whole campus. The campus is green. The hostel is away from college. The hostel facilities are good. There is no connectivity because the hostel is in Dhuti, Dongargaon, which is nearly 15 away from our college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus playground and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers three categories of rooms: general, VIP, and VVIP. The general category is for students who can't pay all the fees at once, so they can pay the amount every month. In each room, there are four or five students, each with their own bed, bathroom (with hot water), and toilet. The VIP room has four students with comfortable beds with mattresses, a wardrobe, and a cupboard. The VVIP room is the same as the VIP room except that it has three students and air conditioning. We can eat ...

reviews.review_heading: TGPCET is a dream of college many students and it provides many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus and infrastructure of our college are the main attractive to many students which is worth it. Some of the classrooms in our college are equipped with projectors. The hostel life of our college is considered to be the best. It is equipped with Wi-Fi, cleaned bathrooms, and good-quality food. The hostel budlings are well-equipped with good furniture, perfect lights, and fans.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gaikwad-Patil College.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided by the college are good. The college provides big grounds as well as a cafeteria and free Wi-Fi on the campus. The food provided in the hostel is also good, as are the medical facilities provided by the college, which promotes many sports games and many other things.

individual_reviews.title: Review of State Institute of Engineering and Technology, Nilokheri.

reviews.review_heading: Review of State Institute of Engineering and Technology, Nilokheri.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were really well. Infrastructure was also good and maintained. It provided a clean hostel, and quality of mess was good. But food was quite tough to accept. But rest of the things were good. Enjoy your hostel life and focus on studies. Security was also so much good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is exactly situated in Nilokheri.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. There is Wi-Fi only in the library. They have labs, but the machines are not working. Yes, a small canteen. The girls' hostel is good. The boys' hostel is not good. In this college, trips and lab equipment are not conducted for a product table condition.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are overall so, but there is placement for mechanical branch only.
reviews.review_text: Labs are okay, but the computers are in bad condition; most of the computers are not working. Wi-Fi is not provided on the campus. The hostel is in bad condition. I suggest not taking the hostel if you are a boy. The girls' hostel is very good, but the mess food is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: College is average in terms of describing.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is average.
Hostel qualities are also average.
The quality of food is average, as the menu of the hostel is only based on the choices of the chefs, and the students' choice is neglected.
No sports or games are much promoted or improved in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Electronic and Communication Engineering Review from SIET.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available at the college was good enough for our course. The college has multiple facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, a library, sports facilities, and a canteen. The quality of these facilities is good. The hostel is located near the campus, and the food in the mess was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available were good classrooms with well-ventilated classrooms and the labs were also very well maintained with all the equipment required for doing practicals such as chemical in chemistry labs. Hostels are also equipped with Wi-Fi and a good mess.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for completing your graduation with limited money, highly efficient.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a good location. But the facilities provided by the college are very limited. There is no Wi-Fi on campus, which is the biggest issue. Labs are available for every branch, which is a plus. The library is small, but it is pretty good for students. As per hostel management,. The hostel is average for boys, but for girls, the hostel is better. The mess food is not at all good. The canteen is available on campus but has only a limited items. The sports activities are also l...

reviews.review_heading: Review of State Institute of Engineering and Technology, Nilokheri.
reviews.review_text:
- The facilities for the course were quite amazing, and everything is almost perfect such as the labs. The labs are well-manufactured with good infrastructure, and all equipment required for this course is available. The classrooms are also fine and well-designed, quite comfortable, and books are available in the library with every type of book.
- The quality of the hostel is also satisfying, as the hostel is well-structured. The mess is also well-prepared, and the garden is well-maintained with...

reviews.review_heading: Best government engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good and attractive. Wi-Fi speed throughout the campus is quite strong. Classrooms are fully maintained; the sizes of desks are quite large as needed by students; projects labs are quite fully Wi-Fi, air conditioned and cleaned properly.

reviews.review_heading: A precise, genuine, and trustful college.
reviews.review_text: Almost every lab facility is available in our college for our course with state-of-the-art infrastructure. Wi-Fi (will be) is still not available in college but an optical fiber-able leased line is available in every lab. The library is good, with books available for every subject. The hostel facility is also good but only available to 3rd year students (boys) and for girls, it is available to any year students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best for those students who want to study in a government college.
reviews.review_text: The library in our college is available during college time besides recess time. You can get every book related to your semester subject. There are also books related to competitive exams for various branches. The infrastructure of our college is good, with a garden in the middle.

reviews.review_heading: Moderate placements and satisfactory infrastructure with decent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is of average type. Labs and classrooms are average but there are concerns about limited Wi-Fi access. The mess food is satisfactory, and overall, the facilities are satisfactory. The library is considered average, and there's room for improvement in sports facilities. The canteen is also there, providing satisfactory snacks and food. NSS and NCC facilities are also provided at the college.

reviews.review_heading: My review is about 3.5 stars.
reviews.review_text:
There is not much facilities available but Wi-Fi is available 
Infrastructures is not so great like the college building and girls hostel building is good but the boys hostel is not good. I suggest to take a PG. The food is normal not that great canteen is available, there is civil hospital, for sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Students point of view regarding the college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college, but the library is good. There is a college ground, but no sports activities will be performed by the college, and good classrooms, but without AC, so in the summers it's difficult, and almost all infrastructure is good, but the same renovation is required, and the college will work on it.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with faculty members and the crowd.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides labs, classrooms, a library, etc. Wi-Fi is limited only to labs. The quality of the food in the mess is decent. The boys' hostel is reasonable. The girls' hostel is well-maintained. Wi-Fi is good. The infrastructure of our college is decent.

review_content.General: The classrooms are airy, clean, and have very good furniture. Projectors are also present in each and every class for better learning. The library is also good as expected, with a lot of study material, a good staff, and a very disciplined environment. Now, talking about the canteen, the food is top-class and has various options with a good environment. A sports week is also held every year with almost every possible game, including indoor and outdoor ones. The hostels are also good with a clean environment, and the mess is also good. The university also takes students on venture trips.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best university with the best staff and nature. The environment is good.

review_content.Placements: Many students are in our college. This is the best college I've ever seen; it not only offers studies but also includes co-curricular activities and courses like music, drawing, tabla, and many more. NCC is available here. I've seen many seniors go abroad for placements and earn very good salaries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is neat and clean, with every possible facility like canteens, labs, water purifiers, and more. The library is available, and almost every book is accessible there. The hostel is clean and well-maintained, with a gym and additional amenities. Sports facilities are available at our university. Every year, an inter-university sports meet is held.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The SGRR university is not good for commerce students.

review_content.Placements: The placement system is very bad people usually don't get any placement from the college. Companies only pick students who have done internships from outside. If they pick, they only give marketing jobs or field sales, with an average salary of 2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Washrooms are dirty and not cleaned properly. No transport facilities. The projector for smart classes does not work properly. Average canteen facilities with only a few items of snacks available. No sports facilities, they have only 1 sports room, where max 10 students can play at a time. They have 2-3 indoor sports.

faqs.answer: Shri Guru Ram Rai University Kotdwar offers admission to respective courses on the basis of merit and valid entrance scores. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to secure a seat at the University for the chosen course. Furthermore, candidates must fill out the application form through the official website of SGRRU Dehradun and confirm the candidature. After a successful submission of application form, candidates will be shortlisted on the basis of the given eligibility criteria. For final admission, candidates must pay the fees to confirm the seat.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College for life long journey.

content.Placements: 78% of students got placement last year. The highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Grow Infratech and Mahant Indresh Hospital are among the recruiters. 30% got internships in well-known business companies. Roles like HR and sales manager are offered in good companies. It means if you want placement, study well and you will get it.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, libraries, smart classrooms, canteen, everything is there. Everything you need to study fully is available there. You don’t need to worry about space, teacher support, or anything in the college. If you need support at any point, contact any teacher or senior, everyone is very supportive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in PCM, PMD, PMG, PMS, CBZ, ZBG (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, this university is good, including all the aspects that a student looks for.

content.Placements: Approximately 65% of freshers opt for B.Sc. Now, some of them are pursuing their Masters at IITs, some have been selected for government jobs, and some are doing M.Sc. with research in core subjects. Overall, all of them are now doing well for their future. Placements are also good, as our university brings in top companies for students.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are airy, clean, and have very good furniture. Projectors are also present in each and every class for better learning. The library is also good as expected, with a lot of study material, a good staff, and a very disciplined environment. Now, talking about the canteen, the food is top-class and has various options with a good environment. A sports week is also held every year with almost every possible game, including indoor and outdoor ones. The hostels are also good with a clean environment, and the mess is also good. The university also takes students on venture trips.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best university with the best staff and nature. The environment is good.

content.Placements: Many students are in our college. This is the best college I've ever seen; it not only offers studies but also includes co-curricular activities and courses like music, drawing, tabla, and many more. NCC is available here. I've seen many seniors go abroad for placements and earn very good salaries.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is neat and clean, with every possible facility like canteens, labs, water purifiers, and more. The library is available, and almost every book is accessible there. The hostel is clean and well-maintained, with a gym and additional amenities. Sports facilities are available at our university. Every year, an inter-university sports meet is held.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The SGRR university is not good for commerce students.

content.Placements: The placement system is very bad people usually don't get any placement from the college. Companies only pick students who have done internships from outside. If they pick, they only give marketing jobs or field sales, with an average salary of 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Washrooms are dirty and not cleaned properly. No transport facilities. The projector for smart classes does not work properly. Average canteen facilities with only a few items of snacks available. No sports facilities, they have only 1 sports room, where max 10 students can play at a time. They have 2-3 indoor sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good placements and teachers are knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Some students report excellent opportunities and high placement rates, while others express satisfaction with the support and outcomes. Factors like the specific college, course, and individual student performance play a significant role. 50% of students secure internships.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of classrooms, labs, libraries, hostels, and sports facilities, as well as the availability of Wi-Fi and other amenities, is good. Classrooms are spacious, well-maintained, and equipped with advanced technology. Hostels offer decent rooms and good food.

courses_data.description: Shri Guru Ram Rai University MBA offers a two-year full-time master's degree in MBA. The applicants who want to be admitted to the MBA in Shri Guru Ram Rai University must appear for one entrance exams accepted by Shri Guru Ram Rai University, such as CAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT. The MBA course is offered in two specialisations, namely,Master of Business Administration (MBA) andMBA in Hospital Administration (MBA HA). For more details about Shri Guru Ram Rai University MBA admission 2025, go through the following section:

faqs.question: How can I get MBA seat at Shri Guru Ram Rai University?
faqs.answer: Shri Guru Ram Rai University offers two-year MBA courses in full-time mode. Applicants who are interested in an MBA can apply for the admission form online or offline. To be eligible for admission to the MBA, applicants must appear for one entrance exam accepted by the university, including CAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT have a graduation degree with a 50% aggregate.

faqs.question: Can I join MBA directly at Shri Guru Ram Rai University?
faqs.answer: Shri Guru Ram Rai University admission to MBA courses is entrance-based.  Interested applicants are required to apply and appear for one entrance exams accepted by the university, such as  CAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT. Additionally, applicants must have to fill out the application form online to get admission. However, the selection criteria for the MBA HA course are based on merit. The candidate must pass a bachelor's degree in any stream with a minimum 45% aggregate.

The BBA course is offered in two specialisations, namely, Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)andBachelor of Business Administration (Hons.). faqs.question: Is BBA available at Shri Guru Ram Rai University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the BBA course is available at Shri Guru Ram Rai University. The university offers BBA courses at the UG level. Shri Guru Ram Rai University's admission process is merit-based.

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing. You will learn so many things from here as well you will enjoy the events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. Labs are amazing. I am learning so many things from labs. The library is also beneficial for us. Classroom with smart TV is available on our campus which helps us to understand clearly through visuality. It will be beneficial.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average. There is a fine infrastructure, but the placements are not good enough.

There are projectors in every class, and I have been to the computer lab only, so half of the computers are not working. I don't stay in the hostel, but the canteen food is okay. According to me, hygiene is maintained, and the washrooms are pretty well too. They just need to provide sanitary napkins for girls.

reviews.review_heading: College has the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The main facility is our campus is too big or sufficient for students. University has its hospital, so students can get good information about their course and there is also good sports culture. There are smart classrooms for students so they can learn or understand easily.

reviews.review_heading: This university has a lot of good education which you won't find anywhere else.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and library facilities are available in good condition and parking. There is a lot of space in it. Medical facilities are very good in which medicine and different kinds of things are used. There is also a ground for playing.

reviews.review_heading: Shri Guru Ram Rai University is a great college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and canteen are available and they have the best service. Every department has different buildings. It has neat and clean classrooms with smart TVs and good infrastructure, including fans, blackboard, good desks, and chairs for students.

reviews.review_heading: NAAC inspection made the university make changes in it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is now the most impressive thing in the university as it is focusing more on the ambiance and a home-like environment for the students. The food provided is also good in the hostel and canteens, plus the sports facilities have also been provided to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SGRR University.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the best education and one of the best facilities all over Dehradun. The infrastructure quality is impressive. The college provides free Wi-Fi to all the students, which has no limit to use. The classrooms and labs are neat, clean, and fully comfortable. The library is also available for students, in which the seating arrangements are very impressive with a peaceful environment.

reviews.review_heading: Shri Guru Ram Rai University.
reviews.review_text: This course is one of the best courses in the medical field. There are many scopes for this course. The hostel is compulsory for nursing students as there are night shifts or late-night work to provide safety to the students. The hostel is well-maintained and near to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Get the professional course of Journalism, B.A. Mass Communications.
reviews.review_text: No doubt, our faculty members are very polite and supportive, comparatively. They are familiar with us and always try to make us feel comfortable. However, they don't have sufficient knowledge of new media tools and technology, and the software used to work in media houses. The college infrastructure is just okay. There is a mini media lab, but Wi-Fi facility is not available.

The University Grants Commission has approved the college, which is situated in Uttarakhand's Dehradun area. The college offers courses in business, arts & sciences, pharmacy, philosophy, and administration at the undergraduate and graduate levels.

paragraphs: Shri Guru Ram Rai University BBA fees includes various component such as tuition fee, othe fee, university exam fee, security deposit and one time enrollement fee. The tuition fee of BBA is INR 30,360 per semester. The overall fee of three semester is INR 2.3 Lacs includes tuition fee, othe fee, university exam fee, security deposit and one time enrollement fee.

Shri Guru Ram Rai University offers over 123 courses at Undergraduate, Postgraduate, Diploma, Doctoral and Certificate levels in varied streams, including Commerce, Arts & Science, Pharmacy and Philosophy. Undergraduate courses are of three-year duration each. Postgraduate courses are two years whereas other additional certificate courses range has six months in duration. Tabulated below is the list of a few popular courses along with their fee:

Shri Guru Ram Rai University charges different total fees for different BSc courses. This happens because the tuition fees charged differ for most of the BSc specialisations. Apart from the tuition fees, the rest of the fee components, such as the exam fee, uniform fee, admission registration fee, etc., remain the same. Check out the below table to know the complete fee structure:
Fee Components
Amount
Tuition Fees
INR 37,950 - INR 5.1 lakh
Hostel Fees
INR 2.69 Lacs - INR 5.18 lakh
One-time Payment
Other Fees
INR 16,500 - INR 1.24 lakh
Total Fees
INR 3.3 Lacs - INR 11.83 lakh
Note: The fee mentioned above is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

Yes, the university offers scholarship for Sports Quota. Shri Guru Ram Rai University Scholarship offers various scholarship schemes to the students. The university offers concession of 50%,  30% and 20% in First Year Tuition Fee. For more details, students can check the table presented below:
Category
Fee Concession
Scholarship for Sports Quota
- Concession of 50% in First Year Tuition Fee (National Participants)
- Concession of 30% in First Year Tuition Fee (School State Medalists)
- Concession of 20% in First Year Tuition Fee (District School Medalists)

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and BFA. Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering courses stands around INR 3,07,964 to 5,32,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied about faculty, average placement, good infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement of our college is average. The highest package goes up to 8 LPA and the median package is 4.5 LPA. Nearly 90% of students got placement in our branch. The college also provides internship offers for 3rd-year students. TCS, and IBM are some of the top recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available at our college are good. The canteen quality can be improved a bit. The Wi-Fi connection is good. The library is spacious but lacks AC. Classrooms are not that advanced. The college has two turfs where you can play cricket and many games after college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, there are so many reasons in 2015, but the placement was not decreased; it's been average .

review_content.Placements: In Vasantdada Patil College, there are 75% of students who can be selected for placement every year. The average package in my college is 5 LPA, and the highest is 17 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tata are coming for placement. So many companies are coming for placement .
review_content.Infrastructure: In Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil College, there is a hostel Wi-Fi facility. The labs have very few instruments. In the college classes, the class quality is very nice. The library has 5000+ books available for reading. The infrastructure is very nice.

review_summary.college_name: Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, decent infrastructure, and supportive faculty, but practical exposure is needed

content.Placements: In our batch, around 70-80% of students from Information Technology are placed. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA, the average package is 3.5-4 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, LTI, and Accenture. About 60-70% of students got internships mainly from companies like TCS, Capgemini, and local startups. Top roles offered are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, and web develope
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped classrooms with projectors and a reliable Wi-Fi connection for academic use. The computer labs have updated systems with all the necessary software. The library is spacious, offering plenty of academic resources and ample study space. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and basic furniture. The mess provides average-quality food, including both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, though there is room for improvement. Medical facilities include a campus clinic and emergency care. Sports grounds and indoor games are also available for students’ fitness and recreation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would highly prefer to join this college.

content.Placements: I am in the first-year AIML department. Students in computer engineering got placed. The highest salary package offered is 27 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are AWS, JP Morgan and L&T. Nearly 70-60% of students got internships in companies like JP Morgan. Courses offered in the college are IT, computer engineering, artificial intelligence and machine learning, mechatronics, and ECS.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has each facility. The food is nice. The only issue with the hostel is that it is far away from the college. The hostel provides good quality food for students. For residing, all facilities are available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied about faculty, average placement, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: The placement of our college is average. The highest package goes up to 8 LPA and the median package is 4.5 LPA. Nearly 90% of students got placement in our branch. The college also provides internship offers for 3rd-year students. TCS, and IBM are some of the top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available at our college are good. The canteen quality can be improved a bit. The Wi-Fi connection is good. The library is spacious but lacks AC. Classrooms are not that advanced. The college has two turfs where you can play cricket and many games after college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Yes, there are so many reasons in 2015, but the placement was not decreased; it's been average .

content.Placements: In Vasantdada Patil College, there are 75% of students who can be selected for placement every year. The average package in my college is 5 LPA, and the highest is 17 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tata are coming for placement. So many companies are coming for placement .
content.Infrastructure: In Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil College, there is a hostel Wi-Fi facility. The labs have very few instruments. In the college classes, the class quality is very nice. The library has 5000+ books available for reading. The infrastructure is very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Okay-ish experience, seniors are helpful.

content.Placements: The placements are not that good. If you are looking for a college only for placements, I would not recommend this college. The packages offered by the college are very low, and the average package goes only up to 6-7 LPA. You might have the skills, but the average packages are way too low.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen food is nice, there is a court/garden to play, and there is a turf for you to play football and stuff. The infrastructure is okay, there is availability of Wi-Fi, and the library is nice and also provides a good amount of seating area.

The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 148839 and 207035 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 148839, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 132661.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 148839.

For the General category, the Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 76.9 and 90.02, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 90.02. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 90.02. reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not too good, but the labs are present in our college. Wi-Fi is not good, and infrastructure for our department is okay, not too good. The quality of hostels is not good, so I left the hostel and now live in my rental flat. A mess is also available in our college, and the food is very good. For sports, a turf is available.

reviews.review_heading: My life in Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Live classrooms, Wi-Fi and libraries are well-maintained by the college. Which helps students focus on their studies as well as on sports.

reviews.review_heading: Placement of college is good .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. College is of 6 floors, and each floor is dedicated to a specific department and branch. They have their own labs and classrooms for lectures and practicals, which is a good thing. Hostels are also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Impressive infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not that bad. We have high-speed Wi-Fi all over the campus. Labs are good, but some of the lab ACs don’t work or don’t have any. We have 4 labs, 2 with good AC and chairs, and the rest are with fresh air. Classrooms are average, with no projectors or whiteboards. The benches are not too bad. The library service is good, but there are no PCs or AC, and it becomes quite uncomfortable to study during exam weeks. There are no hostel or food services available, and the c...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2024, really.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good library with lots of books in it. Labs of all departments are pretty nice with AC available and 24/7 internet. All the classrooms are very well-maintained and airy all the time. A good canteen is available in our college. A turf is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: PVPPCOE Chunnabhati Mumbai review.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very helpful. Considering our academics and doubts regarding any topic, students are provided with extra doubt sessions after college too if they request help. The campus could be improved, as for now, construction is going on in the campus area and the canteen can be upgraded by focusing on their food taste and appearance.

reviews.review_heading: College has great faculty.
reviews.review_text:
Yes, there is hostel facility available for students; there are two hostels:
1) Wadala
2) Kandivali
Cost for Accommodation: Rs 10,000 per year
For Food (mess charge): Rs 54,000 per year
The quality of the food is awesome. I'm in the Wadala branch hostel, and I can assure you this is the best hostel environment you can get at this rate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with every amenities of our college and staff is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our College Have A Good Libra with lots of books in it. Labs of all department are pretty nice with AC available and 24/7 internet. All the classrooms are very well maintained and airy all time. Good canteen is available in our college. Turf is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. Placements are very good. Number of tress are there.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available. A number of books are available in the library. The hostel is good. Free Wi-Fi is also available in hostels. The hostel is clean and clear. The environment of the hostel is very good. The library is enormous, with 400 students able to study there at any given time.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent infrastructure with neat and clean ambience.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a central library with huge collection of books. Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls with good condition rooms, and hygienic food. Rooms are regularly cleaned. Our college has 3 turfs for cricket and football.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Padmabhushan Vasantdada Patil Pratishthan College of Engineering

likes.text: Top companies which visit our college for placements were L&T, Capgemini, TCS, Amazon and Byju's.
The college provides an internship opportunity for the students to train them for the industry.

The college has the very good infrastructure in terms of labs, playground, classrooms and the campus is provided with free Wi-Fi.

The teachers are very experienced, and they know how to teach hard topics in an easy manner to the students, which helps them to grasp the topic easily.

reviews_list.review_title: Great facilities, cheerful campus life, supportive faculty and improving placements.

review_content.Placements: My college has been showing a steady growth in placements year after year. The average package currently stands around 3.7 LPA, while the highest package has gone up to 21 LPA. Placement opportunities are improving every year with more companies visiting the campus and offering diverse roles. review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are excellent. For girls, hostels are available from the 1st year. While for boys, hostels are available from 3rd and 4th year. It has clean rooms, proper maintenance, and most importantly, the food served in mess is great and delicious. The hostel and course infrastructure are also very good, with Wi-Fi available across campus, well-conditioned labs, and a library stocked with all the necessary books. Overall, both hostel and academic infrastructure provide a very comfortable and supportive environment for students.

review_summary.college_name: Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good Return on Investment.

content.Placements: Decent placement opportunity. Placement rate is 50 - 60%. Average package (CTC) is around 3 - 4 LPA. Most students focus on higher studies. They mostly appear for the GATE exam and go for master's degrees. A good training and placement cell is available.
content.Infrastructure: The library is available. Classrooms are good. Labs are good. Physics and Chemistry labs are also here for the Basic Science and Humanities department. Campus Wi-Fi is available. Hostels are quite good for a government college. There are 2 boys' hostels and 2 girls' hostels present.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers you quality studies.

content.Placements: Our college provides a balanced blend of opportunities, learning, and student life. One of the strongest aspects is the placement and internship exposure. Major recruiters such as Elite Construction and Skipper Limited regularly visit the campus, giving students excellent chances to start their careers with reputed companies. In addition, many students get internships in PWD and the railway department, which adds valuable hands-on experience and helps them understand real-world applications of engineering concepts.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the college offers strong placement support, knowledgeable faculty members, and good food facilities, though hostel and Wi-Fi accessibility could be improved.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great facilities, cheerful campus life, supportive faculty and improving placements.

content.Placements: My college has been showing a steady growth in placements year after year. The average package currently stands around 3.7 LPA, while the highest package has gone up to 21 LPA. Placement opportunities are improving every year with more companies visiting the campus and offering diverse roles. Placement cell is also becoming more active and supportive helping students with training and guidance.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are excellent. For girls, hostels are available from the 1st year. While for boys, hostels are available from 3rd and 4th year. It has clean rooms, proper maintenance, and most importantly, the food served in mess is great and delicious. The hostel and course infrastructure are also very good, with Wi-Fi available across campus, well-conditioned labs, and a library stocked with all the necessary books. Overall, both hostel and academic infrastructure provide a very comfortable and supportive environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Consider this only for getting a degree.

content.Placements: No good companies are coming right now. In our colleges only startups, but you could improve your skills and work on your self, as you will get more time.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure, it's exactly how you would expect in a state government college: not maintained, dirty classrooms, and not enough modern faculty members that you would expect in a B.Tech college. The facilities on hostel are decent. You get good food, the canteen is nice but small. There are no medical facilities, although a nearby nursing home is situated, but it stays closed. About sports and games, cricket, football, volleyball, etc. Tournaments are organized in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Big campus with good college life. One of the best faculty and a good environment.

content.Placements: In our last batch, almost 50% of students got on-campus placements and the rest got off-campus or cleared other exams like GATE. Good placements with high packages and a good study environment.
content.Infrastructure: Nice and well-maintained facilities are available in our college, and advanced labs and instruments are available for practical. Classrooms are well maintained and enough technical with smart board and projector facilities, good mess food with cheap canteen facilities. Seniors and junior relationships are very nice and ragging-free campus.

description: Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to multiple courses. Refer to the sections below to view the Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College WBJEE cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds and categories, etc. Other exam-related updates are below:

Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College cutoff 2024 has been released for WBJEE, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College WBJEE cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the WBJEE 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to the Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College can refer to the table below to review the WBJEE cutoff ranks from the past three years across various categories and specialisations, which will provide insight into the year-wise cutoffs. Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College

Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College WBJEE cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released for selecting students for B.E. / B.Tech courses. For General Home State category, the last round closing ranks were in the range of 10448 to 24031 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 10448, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering emerged as the most challenging specialisation for admission. In the first round, the

Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with past two years cutoff details are tabulated below for different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories, etc. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with WBJEE last round closing ranks of 10448, 13013 and 16048, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good Return on Investment.
reviews.review_text: The library is available. Classrooms are good. Labs are good. Physics and Chemistry labs are also here for the Basic Science and Humanities department. Campus Wi-Fi is available. Hostels are quite good for a government college. There are 2 boys' hostels and 2 girls' hostels present.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers you quality studies.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the college offers strong placement support, knowledgeable faculty members, and good food facilities, though hostel and Wi-Fi accessibility could be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities, cheerful campus life, supportive faculty and improving placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent. For girls, hostels are available from the 1st year. While for boys, hostels are available from 3rd and 4th year. It has clean rooms, proper maintenance, and most importantly, the food served in mess is great and delicious. The hostel and course infrastructure are also very good, with Wi-Fi available across campus, well-conditioned labs, and a library stocked with all the necessary books. Overall, both hostel and academic infrastructure provide a very comfortable ...

reviews.review_heading: Consider this only for getting a degree.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure, it's exactly how you would expect in a state government college: not maintained, dirty classrooms, and not enough modern faculty members that you would expect in a B.Tech college. The facilities on hostel are decent. You get good food, the canteen is nice but small. There are no medical facilities, although a nearby nursing home is situated, but it stays closed. About sports and games, cricket, football, volleyball, etc. Tournaments are organized in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Big campus with good college life. One of the best faculty and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Nice and well-maintained facilities are available in our college, and advanced labs and instruments are available for practical. Classrooms are well maintained and enough technical with smart board and projector facilities, good mess food with cheap canteen facilities. Seniors and junior relationships are very nice and ragging-free campus.

reviews.review_heading: RKMGEC is an overview of a government institution in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are below average. The internet connection is unstable throughout the campus, with Wi-Fi being almost useless. Labs are not up to the mark due to a lack of funding from the government. Classrooms are decent, but they lack smart class features. As for the hostel, it is clean and tidy, and the maintenance is good. But the internet issue still persists inside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is useless but classrooms are good. The library is useless. The hostel depends on students and hostel food also. But the canteen food is not so good but okay. We did not eat at the hostel and we ate at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good, but teachers are not that experienced.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for every subject which are required. The number of machines are less, but we can easily adjust. There is a library, which is pretty good, and classrooms are okay. There is a mess facility, a medical facility, and a common room for sports. The room has a capacity of 3 students, giving them with a bed and a table.

reviews.review_heading: Preferable College Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and other facilities of the college campus are quite preferable. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are available. Hostel facilities are also nice and preferable. The food quality in the mess is nice and healthy. Canteen facilities are also available within the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Average College campus, honest review.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms available, but they are average and not so preferable. Hostel facilities are very nice, and the mess food is also nice. Sports and games facilities are not available. There are both boys' and girls' hostels provided for both boys and girls. Some facilities are missing.

reviews.review_heading: Our college facility, placements, library, and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library, labs, sports, and other extra-curricular facilities. Only there is one problem which is 1st and second-year boys' are not allotted in the hostel. Boys get a hostel from the third year. Our college surroundings are good.

reviews.review_heading: Natural environment, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities regarding this course are quite better. Department faculty members are very humble and motivating. As our college is not so much old, there are some lab facilities still missing, but most of the lab facilities are available. Wi-Fi is also available. Hostel facility is also quite nice. There are two boys' and two girls' hostels. The food quality of the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College Purulia .
reviews.review_text: Yes, it is all good. One can stay with their own business in the store by dihedral, and the link below provides access to your valuable time for the delivery team. Engineering students from above 75% spend very little, with only just 15K in 1 semester of 1 year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramkrishna Mahato Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very beautiful and attractive. In every department of this college, Wi-Fi is available for the students. Hostel facilities are not available for 1st and 2nd year boys. From the 3rd year, boys are allotted to hostels. Hostels are available to girls beginning in their first year.

reviews.review_heading: A good and honest review.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel is too good. Specially old boys hostels food quality is awesome. Dal, chawal is awesome. This is a government college so the hostel feels is less expensive than other private colleges. But one problem is there. Only third year and fourth year students will get hostel rooms
.

college_info.intro: TSSM College of Engineering Pune popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Capgemini, TCS, TATA Motors, and others. The college students can become Engineers, Front-End Developers, and Network Administrators, or can go for various other job profiles. JSPM - TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research students are taught technical as well as analytical skills to make them job-ready. Below mentioned are some of the TSSM College of Engineering Pune courses and their respective eligibility and TSSM College of Engineering Pune fee:

placements.overview: TSSM College of Engineering Pune placements 2025 will be updated here once out. TSSM College of Engineering Pune is visited by top companies for placements such as , and others. TSSM Bhivarabai College of Engineering has concluded its placement drive for 2023. As per the official report, a total of 170 offers were made by top recruiters. Moreover, a total of 60 offers has been made between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA, respectively. Capgemini made the highest number of offers, i.e., 30 offers.

It is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, guest lectures and seminars.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: TSSM College of Engineering Pune offers PG, UG, and other programmes to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. At the PG level, TSSM Bhivarabai College of Engineering Narhe, offers an MTech programme to students. The college also provides diploma programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the TSSM College of Engineering Pune courses and their respective eligibility and TSSM College of Engineering Pune fee:

faqs.answer: A:    To join TSSM College of Engineering Pune directly, candidates can apply for the direct second year admission. Candidates need to clear Diploma course in Engineering and Technology with at least 45% aggregate (40% marks in case of Candidates of Backward Class categories, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disability category belonging to Maharashtra State). For more information students can visit the official website.
faqs.question: Can I join TSSM College of Engineering Pune directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fees for BE and M.E course is different at TSSM College of Engineering Pune. The college is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University. Students can check the table below to know course-wise tuition fee:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBEINR 2.3 lakh-INR 3.2 lakhMEINR 1.5 lakhThis information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the fee for TSSM College of Engineering Pune?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed BE/BTech or equivalent degree course can apply for admission. The degree programme should have been passed with a minimum of 50% aggregate. Applicants must hold the pass certificates at the time of form filling and admission. The documents have to be submitted to the college for verificatio purposes.
faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for M.Tech at JSPM - TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    The college has a total of 420 seats for the BE programmes. It has the highest number of seats for BE in Computer Engineering - 180 seats. For other courses, the seat intake is 60 (each). The admission is granted as per sanctioned seat intake and performance in accepted exam. It must be noted that the mentioned seat intake is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however, still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There are some teachers, a campus and a good hostel. But I am not satisfied.

review_content.Placements: In the ENTC branch, placements are nearly 80%. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. A maximum number of students get the lowest package of 2.5 LPA as it is the core branch. All placements are in core branched, and high-end packages are not sponsored. It contacts companies to conduct interviews for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. A washing machine is available in the hostel. There are 6 washing machines but it is paid. Labs are full of digital machines. Classrooms have blackboards and digital screens. The canteen food is good at a high price. In sports and games, faculty members support us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, infrastructure, and placement.

review_content.Placements: For computer engineering, our college needs above 87% in CET. 60% of students are placed in our college. The average package is 4-5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and Amazon have also visited our college. The computer department is all about competition, and our college provides good instructions on competition. They also hold technical competitions like Tech Fest and Mini Projects.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good. All the necessary equipment is present in labs. They are clean and good. The computer lab has PCs for all students. Lab management is very nice, and the lab instructors are strict. Labs have a very silent atmosphere.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is very nice, and the faculty is also supportive.

content.Placements: Placement is not so good. Placement is average. Our placement is fully dependent on the CGPA of four years and the marks of the 12th grade. And the skills also should be strong, and our communication skills should be very nice and try to speak English nicely and neatly.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and hostel for girls are very good. In the girls' hostel, there are only living arrangements, not a mess. We have to look for a mess outside the gate or on campus, there are also 2-3 messes. The girls' hostel has a lot of rules for going outside and lots of security.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: About my college JSPM - TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research.

content.Placements: TSSM (JSPM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research) has partnerships with various companies for research collaborations, internships, and placements. These include well-known companies like BSNL, SMART Logic Technologies, MASS Technologies, Jamboree Education (P) Ltd., Mikro Innotech India Pvt. Ltd., SkyWings, Bodh Develops, Rohit Enterprises, L and D Infotech Pvt. Ltd., CYIN Solutions Pvt. Ltd., JSM InfoTech, Speed Techserve Pvt. Ltd., Star Light Pune, Fast Earthing Enterprises, H. T. Switchgears, Synergy Solutions, GTT Foundation Pune, Shri Vinayak Develops, Morya Construction, BOD's Develops, SW Systems, Kakade Lasers, and Seinumero Nirman Pvt Ltd.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: There are some teachers, a campus and a good hostel. But I am not satisfied.

content.Placements: In the ENTC branch, placements are nearly 80%. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. A maximum number of students get the lowest package of 2.5 LPA as it is the core branch. All placements are in core branched, and high-end packages are not sponsored. It contacts companies to conduct interviews for students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. A washing machine is available in the hostel. There are 6 washing machines but it is paid. Labs are full of digital machines. Classrooms have blackboards and digital screens. The canteen food is good at a high price. In sports and games, faculty members support us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, infrastructure, and placement.

content.Placements: For computer engineering, our college needs above 87% in CET. 60% of students are placed in our college. The average package is 4-5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and Amazon have also visited our college. The computer department is all about competition, and our college provides good instructions on competition. They also hold technical competitions like Tech Fest and Mini Projects.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good. All the necessary equipment is present in labs. They are clean and good. The computer lab has PCs for all students. Lab management is very nice, and the lab instructors are strict. Labs have a very silent atmosphere.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges in Pune.

content.Placements: 70 to 80% students get placement every year. The highest package is about 8 LPA and the average package for every department is about 4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Capgemini, Infosys etc. Internships are also provided by the college both with and without a stipend.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, as it is very big and spacious, with 3 members in 1 room. The library has around 130k books for reading. Numerous messes are available, and the canteen is also in the campus area. Sports and games are available in the campus area.

admission_process.title: TSSM College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research admission enquiry form 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, BE and M.E at the UG and PG level. The college is affiliated withSavitribai Phule Pune University.To get admission to TSSM College of Engineering Pune, candidates must have an entrance exam score such as JEE Main/GATE. Overall, the college offers more than ten courses in the stream of Engineering. The application process atTSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Researchis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutTSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research course admission2025.

TSSM Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research courses' admissions are based on merit/ entrance exam scores. Further, the university also offers direct second-year admissions. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularTSSM’s Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research courses:
Read More:TSSM College of Engineering Brochure
Students can check the detailed TSSM College of Engineering admission infographic below:

TSSM Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research charges different fees for the different programmes offered at the UG and PG levels. Candidates are first required to submit the application fees during the time of registration. TSSM College of Engineering tuition fees range between INR 1.46 lakh and INR 3.2 lakh. Given below are theTSSM College of Engineering Pune fees:
Courses Name
Total Tuition Fees
INR 2.3 lakh-INR 3.2 lakh
INR 1.46 lakh
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat allotment at TSSM College of Engineering Pune is made based on the entrance examination appeared by candidates and the category to which candidates belong. Given below is the tabular representation of theTSSM Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research seat intakefor BE and M.E programmes:
Courses Name
Seat Intake
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

TSSM College of Engineering's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the TSSM College of Engineering:
STEP 1: TSSM College of Engineering Application Process 2025
Aspirants can apply for BE and M.E courses at the official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at TSSM College of Engineering are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkTSSM College of Engineering cutoffdetails here. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: TSSM College of Engineering Pune cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the TSSM College of Engineering Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

TSSM College of Engineering Pune cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 171553 and 344234 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 171553, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 183602.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 171553.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the TSSM College of Engineering Pune B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 49.23 and 85.21, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 85.21. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 49.23, Civil became the

TSSM College of Engineering Pune MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 85.21. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 85.45 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at TSSM College of Engineering Pune for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:
