reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very nice, and the faculty is also supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel for girls are very good. In the girls' hostel, there are only living arrangements, not a mess. We have to look for a mess outside the gate or on campus, there are also 2-3 messes. The girls' hostel has a lot of rules for going outside and lots of security.

reviews.review_heading: About my college JSPM - TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: Outdoor and indoor sports facilities are available for volleyball, cricket, kabaddi, football, chess, carrom, table tennis, etc. Ground and facilities are available for cricket, football, etc. Students are motivated/encouraged to take part in various tournaments at the college/district/ university/ State/National levels. Students make use of those facilities on a day-to-day basis. The facility is used for conducting Yoga / Meditation.

reviews.review_heading: There are some teachers, a campus and a good hostel. But I am not satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. A washing machine is available in the hostel. There are 6 washing machines but it is paid. Labs are full of digital machines. Classrooms have blackboards and digital screens. The canteen food is good at a high price. In sports and games, faculty members support us.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are good. All the necessary equipment is present in labs. They are clean and good. The computer lab has PCs for all students. Lab management is very nice, and the lab instructors are strict. Labs have a very silent atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, as it is very big and spacious, with 3 members in 1 room. The library has around 130k books for reading. Numerous messes are available, and the canteen is also in the campus area. Sports and games are available in the campus area.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college provides most students with an average placement.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are well-equipped. Smart classrooms are available. Wi-Fi facilities are available throughout the entire college area. The cafeteria is also good and is available inside the college campus. Medical facilities are available, including an ambulance that is available 24 hours on the college campus. Sports and games also take place in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Yes. I'm too much disappointed with this college. No prior placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Average, all staff at the college are just qualified in their degrees and don’t know how to teach very well to students. The average quality of the facilities in the hostel and food quality is decent. No prior facilities for medical staff, but ambulances are there.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, one of the best colleges for lower percentile students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. All basic facilities are there on our college campus. Our college has four hostels, two for boys and two for girls. All have very good facilities so you have nothing to worry about the hostel and mess.

reviews.review_heading: Very good for low percentile students and value for money.
reviews.review_text: There are very good facilities available in our college in all the way, for like hostel, mess, medical, sports, and many more for your personal growth also. The quality of the hostel they provide is very decent but very good compared to other colleges in Pune.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members and facilities for distance students. Best college for average-scored students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is also good enough. There are four college hostels including two boys and two girls hostel. All of them are very good in facilities as compared to other colleges. There is no mess in all hostel that's the best part so we can go where we want. There are many mess options near the college so no worry about that. Medical facilities are also available. There are four canteens on campus. All classrooms are not Wi-Fi enabled but lab has it. There is one library for our d...

reviews.review_heading: TSSM BSCOER Full Review with 2 Pics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and we have nice and clean buildings, but in the hostel, no Wi-Fi is there. We have good labs, and the library is also pretty clean. But the infrastructure of the hostel is average, and the facilities are too bad because water is not 24/7, and we don't get unlimited Wi-Fi. The speed of Wi-Fi is too slow, and many times it doesn't even get connected.

reviews.review_heading: Review of TSSM'S BSCOER college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is full of greenery around campus. It has very good Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are good. Classrooms have facilities like digital boards, projectors, etc. Library is very good and nearly 10,000 books and more than 110 journals are available. Hostel is good. College mess is also available. We can choose private mess outside this college if we do not like that. Many options are available for mess outside this college.

reviews.review_heading: Jspm and tssm bscoer college of engineering, Narhe Pune.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are well-equipped. Smart classrooms are provided for all students. Wi-Fi is available in the entire campus. If we talk about the hostel, the facilities are very good, and the canteen is also available inside the campus, but it is not provided by the hostel. Medical facilities are available, like an ambulance is 24 hours here. Sports and games are the best activities also happening here.

reviews.review_heading: My life at college and its review .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the classes and the building is very good there is AC in every class, which helps the students cool down during the summer season and the quality of the food is very nice. They make very tasty food and it doesn't feel like it's hostel food .

reviews.review_heading: Absolute dissatisfied because of the faculty and course choice.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities are provided; class rooms are not cleaned; canteen food is good but very costly. Hostels are big and security is also good. In this college, you will get specific buildings for every course. But there is a cleaning problem in classes and on the floor.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very good and accurate college.

review_content.Placements: This college placement is good, but the main point depends on you and your knowledge. Your placement depends on your knowledge and your work. The main thing is that the college gives you the opportunity for placement. If you can do the job, then they will select you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are good, like proper classroom conditions, good labs, and all the equipment available in our college. Hostel conditions are good and available at a minimal cost.
review_content.Faculty: Our college faculty is the best because they teach like a friend and understand the students’ problems, where they get confused, and how to solve their problems. The exam schedule is not good because sometimes we are surprised to see the datasheet of exam. My course is B.Pharma, and this course is good for a good future and life survival.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Enjoyed the events, but placements could be better. Peaceful campus with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 90 percent of students in my course are placed through campus placements. The highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package stood at 4 LPA. Some of the top companies that hire from our course include TCS Infosys Wipro Accenture Capgemini Deloitte and more. Some of the common job roles are software developer business analyst data analyst project coordinator and sales/marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our classrooms include Wi Fi labs a library a water cooler and A/C. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. The rooms are clean and of decent size, usually shared by 2 or 3 students. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels as well. There is a 24/7 supply of water and electricity with backup support. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and the medical facilities are very good. For sports, there are outdoor grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, etc. Indoor games like table tennis, carrom, and chess are also available. Some hostels or campuses even have a gym with basic equipment.

review_summary.college_name: Accurate Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average college.

content.Placements: Mainly, all students are placed, but some are not placed due to low CGPA and do not fulfill the criteria of the company. Mainly, students got placed in the Chetu company for a software engineer role with an average package of 3 LPA to 5LPA. Major sales companies come, and also some tech or good companies come.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very bad, and Wi-Fi is good in classrooms but bad in the hostel. The labs and library are average. The hostel facility is the worst, and the behavior of the warden is very bad. I never suggest that you go to a hostel, and the food is also very bad, and many times, a chair or an insect is found in the food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Accurate college is good. This college is worth your money.

content.Placements: 50 percent of the pharmacy students got placed. If they have knowledge, the average package offered is 4 LPA. Many companies come to this college. Jubilant Life Sciences offers a good package for students of the Accurate College of Pharmacy and offers a 4 LPA package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and the classrooms are average. In the hostel, the food is bad, but everything else is good. Whenever I go to our friend's room in the hostel, they always say hostel life is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly knowledgeable and helpful. They understand the students according to the students' capacity and help accordingly in the course of B. Pharm. The study is hard every semester, has different challenges, and 50 percent is the passing percentage. The faculty is good in this college.

admission_overview.college_name: Accurate Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Last Dates

admission_overview.title: Accurate Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Accurate Group of Institutions admission to courses is primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts various national-level entrance exams to shortlist candidates for admission to various AGI courses. For instance, candidates seeking admission to the PGDM course are required to have a valid scorecard of CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ ATMA/ CMAT/ GMAT. The application forms for the Accurate Group of Institutions course admission are released online on the official website of the Institute. Accurate Group of Institutions offers more than ten courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Candidates will have the option to select a course from a wide variety of streams such as management, Engineering, Law, Architecture, Pharmacy, and Computer Applications. Most of the AGI courses are approved by AICTE and offered in affiliation with AKTU.

eligibility_selection.title: Accurate Group of Institutions Eligibility and Selection
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates seeking admission to Accurate Group of Institutions must meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course. The admission criteria for all courses is entrance-based. Aspirants must have the scorecard of a valid entrance exam to get shortlisted for admission. Interested candidates can check out the below table for Accurate Group of Institutions course eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum 50% marks (45% for the reserved category)
Class 12 with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects
Class 12 in PCB with a minimum 50% marks
Class 12
Class 12

For non-tech background students: BBA/ BCom/ BA/ BSc etc., from a recognised University with a minimum 50% marks. For Tech background students: BCA/BSc (IT or CS) from a recognised University with a minimum 50% marks (45% for SC/ ST)
Class 12 or diploma in PCM with a minimum 50% marks

faqs.answer: Candidates are selected for BPharma course at Accurate Group of Institutions on the basis of marks in the CUET exam. Candidates must appear for the exam and achieve a valid aggregate in the same. They must also submit the scorcard for the exam to apply for and confirm admission at the institute.
faqs.question: How can I get selected for BPharma course at Accurate Group of Institutions?

admission_process.title: Accurate Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Accurate Group of Institutions admission processis online. The step-wiseAGI admission processis given below:
1- Registration Process 2025

Contenders must register themselves with the institute in order to apply for admission. The application forms are released on the official website of the Accurate Group of Institutes. Students have to register using a valid email ID and phone number. It must be filled out carefully by the candidate before the last date.
2- Selection Criteria
Students selection based on their performance on the entrance exam. Contenders have to upload valid scorecards during the application process.
3- Admission call and confirmation of seat
If they clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed via email or call. Shortlisted students are required to pay the admission confirmation fee to book their seats.

Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Accurate Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineerin

hostel_campus.college_name: Accurate Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad, and Wi-Fi is good in classrooms but bad in the hostel. The labs and library are average. The hostel facility is the worst, and the behavior of the warden is very bad. I never suggest that you go to a hostel, and the food is also very bad, and many times, a chair or an insect is found in the food.

reviews.review_heading: Accurate college is good. This college is worth your money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and the classrooms are average. In the hostel, the food is bad, but everything else is good. Whenever I go to our friend's room in the hostel, they always say hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and accurate college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are good, like proper classroom conditions, good labs, and all the equipment available in our college. Hostel conditions are good and available at a minimal cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Enjoyed the events, but placements could be better. Peaceful campus with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our classrooms include Wi Fi labs a library a water cooler and A/C. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. The rooms are clean and of decent size, usually shared by 2 or 3 students. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels as well. There is a 24/7 supply of water and electricity with backup support. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and the medical facilities are very good. For sports, there are outdoor grounds for cricket, football, volleybal...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is worthy and it will give us the best result in our final year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice especially labs are so amazing. Hostel rooms are up to date and the mess food is quite better than other hostels. The campus provides a very nice field to play. It provides a gym facility by which students' health gets very nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 22 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and active campus life, average infrastructure, moderate placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a decent infrastructure. Classrooms are equipped with whiteboards but no air conditioning. The labs are adequately maintained, and the library has a good collection of books. Wi-Fi is available but can be slow during peak hours. Hostels are average. The rooms are fine but basic, and the messy food is average. The canteen is functional, with limited variety. Medical facilities are available, but basic. Sports facilities include a ground and a few indoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 21 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Basically college is decent but not best.
reviews.review_text: Not living in the hostel but as per students living in the hostel is not that good, that is decent. Overall, infrastructure is okay. So you might prefer another hostel too. There are many options in the hostel here so it's not a problem.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 30 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and placement is also good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course/ department are good. In our college, a high-speed Wi-Fi network is available. On our campus, good labs are also available. On our campus, good and neat and clean classrooms are available, and a good library is available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 17 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college review. From my side, the overall rating of the college is average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not up to the mark in the college. Some are very old and need maintenance, so they are just average. Wi-Fi is not available in the college. Facilities in the hostel are also very average and not comparable to the fee.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 6 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college according to the fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average considering the fees, which is Rs.1,35,000 per year. The hostel facility is not very good but is manageable. The food is sometimes half-cooked, but the main issue is the hostel warden. Our college has three well maintained canteens providing quality food and a good dining experience. The college atmosphere is lush green, surrounded by beautiful gardens and parks, creating a peaceful and refreshing environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 1 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college review. I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus provides all types of facilities, such as Wi-Fi, projectors in classrooms, and libraries, and comfortable desks and seating. I am not a hosteller, but I know that the hostel in our college is decent, and the food is also decent. I eat there sometimes. The mess is huge. The medical facilities are available both in the hostel and on campus. Sports and games are also played on campus, like basketball, football, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 1 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College life is the best life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome and well-structured. Each department has a different building, so we can find out easily. In every hostel, the food quality is average. Sports and games are always done on our campus as many colleges come to participate. If they win, they will get prizes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college because infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully digital including biometrics attendance and smart board facilities. Hostel are generally considered good. Food in mess is great sometimes it includes dessert and fast food also. Mess keeps raising prices, like the cost of brown rice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good and bad things about Accurate Institute of Management & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course is below average. It has just a simple infrastructure, not so attractive and even not good. Labs are really so bad. Classrooms of my course are like school. The library is not available for anyone and they just say that the library is open 24x7 but it is not real at all. Hostel infrastructure is below average, and no one likes it. The food in the hostel mess is very bad. Food is like animals food, and they think we are animals. There is no medical facility. Games ...

reviews.review_heading: The average package is 4 LPA, so it is good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi and network are okay, and the classrooms are quite good. The library is better for preparation and also to spend time to study purposes. The labs are also good, and we go there twice or thrice a week. The hostel is good, with better food, and the better rooms are supportive friends and roommates. Sports are usually played unofficially and officially by us, and the canteen is just in front of our hostel.

likes.text: Many reputable companies, such as Wipro, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra, visit our college during placement season.
The college offered good placement opportunities for the students of our senior batch.

college_info.college_name: National Fire Service College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for National Fire Service College admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the National Fire Service College:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme can enrol for admission with Class 12 marks. Candidates must complete Class 12 to enrol for the BTech course. The college offers only one UG course, i.e., BTech. National Fire Service College admissions are based on entrance exam.
faqs.question: Does National Fire Service College accept Class 12th marks?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have completed Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics/English as compulsory subjects can apply for NFSC BTech programme. Besides, aspirants must also qualify for the entrance exam to be accepted for admission. The institute admits students based on merit + JEE Main Paper one + the weightage ratio for these will be decided by NFSC's competent authority. Post merit list, the institute will verify documents and conduct a medical examination. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay the National Fire Service College fee to confirm their seats at the institute.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at National Fire Service College?

faqs.answer: A:    National Fire Service College offers BTech courses based on JEE Main score. Further, a minimum of 50% marks in class 12 is necessary to get into NFSC. Under 70 percentile, candidates can enrol for the BTech course. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics/English as compulsory subjects.
faqs.question: Can I get into National Fire Service College with 70 percentile in class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, National Fire Service College offers seat reservations for various students such as SC, ST, EWS, etc. Candidates falling under the specified categories can avail of the reservation benefit only if they hold the documents proving their claim. The university reserves 27% for OBC-NCL. Below are the reservation criteria followed at NFSC :CategoryPercentageOther Backwards Classes (OBC-NCL)27%Scheduled Castes and Schedule Caste converted to Buddhism (SC)15%Schedule Tribes (ST)7.5%General – Economically Weaker Section (GEN-EWS)10%J & K Migrants5%Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme (TFW)5%
faqs.question: Does National Fire Service College offers seat reservation?

review_content.General: For the B.Tech Fire Engineering course at NFSC Nagpur, there are air-conditioned digital classrooms, many well-equipped labs (electrical, fluid mechanics, fire protection, etc. ), a large library with Wi-Fi, and basic Wi-Fi/IT access on campus, while hostel Wi-Fi is limited or not always available. Mess food quality is usually rated average to good with veg and non-Veg options at a reasonable cost, and there is a canteen plus basic medical facilities and first aid on campus. Sports facilities include volleyball, badminton, cricket and indoor games like table tennis, which are decent but not at the level of a big sports university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: In brief, the college is very good.

review_content.Placements: If I talk about my batch, we are the second batch that is learning the syllabus of NEP (new education policy). The percentage of students placed is 95 to 100, with the highest package of 24 LPA, an average package of 12 to 13 LPA and a minimum of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. There are minor issues which is common in all hostels, and the infrastructure of the academic and laboratory is the best, as it has all the equipment that is required to perform practicals. If I talk about the sports, there is a ground, in the morning, on which we perform a fire drill, and the other sports group is under development.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest taking admission in this college because it is a prestigious college in the field of fire.

review_content.Placements: Approximately, there is complete placement in my college. 60 students were placed in the last batch. The highest package was 24 LPA, and the lowest package was 5 LPA. The average package was 13 LPA. Many PSUs. Private and government companies hire engineers from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities like the library, ground, table tennis court, hostel, gym, and fire training ground are available on the campus. Mess and canteen are also available. But the quality of food is a little bad, and medical facilities are also available, such as an ambulance and a doctor.

review_summary.college_name: National Fire Service College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: National Fire Service College

content.Placements: Enrolled in 32 and Batch of B. Tech Fire Engineering at National Fire Service College, Nagpur. Batch strength of 71. NFSC offers average package of 14 LPA. The highest 24 LPA and the lowest 7 LPA. Companies in past are BPCL, IOCL, HPCL, GAIL, ONGC, SAIL. Recruited as a fire officer.
content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained AC classrooms. Hostel is cleaned on a regular basis. Food in mess is up to the mark. Hostel comprises 8 floors where each room has 2 persons staying together. Proper furniture across each room. Two proper almirahs in each room. Four-time food offered in mess every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: NFSC Nagpur - A disciplined, practical fire engineering college with strong placements.

content.Placements: NFSC Nagpur is a specialised national-level college for fire and safety, with very strong placements (almost full batch placed, many in PSUs like ONGC, IOCL, GAIL, NTPC, airports and large industries) and average packages in roughly the low to mid double-digit LPA range. Students get good internships and industrial training in refineries, plants and airports, plus very practical on-campus training using live fire grounds, drills and specialised labs, all inside a disciplined residential campus that helps in fitness and personality development.
content.Infrastructure: For the B.Tech Fire Engineering course at NFSC Nagpur, there are air-conditioned digital classrooms, many well-equipped labs (electrical, fluid mechanics, fire protection, etc. ), a large library with Wi-Fi, and basic Wi-Fi/IT access on campus, while hostel Wi-Fi is limited or not always available. Mess food quality is usually rated average to good with veg and non-Veg options at a reasonable cost, and there is a canteen plus basic medical facilities and first aid on campus. Sports facilities include volleyball, badminton, cricket and indoor games like table tennis, which are decent but not at the level of a big sports university.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: In brief, the college is very good.

content.Placements: If I talk about my batch, we are the second batch that is learning the syllabus of NEP (new education policy). The percentage of students placed is 95 to 100, with the highest package of 24 LPA, an average package of 12 to 13 LPA and a minimum of 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. There are minor issues which is common in all hostels, and the infrastructure of the academic and laboratory is the best, as it has all the equipment that is required to perform practicals. If I talk about the sports, there is a ground, in the morning, on which we perform a fire drill, and the other sports group is under development.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I suggest taking admission in this college because it is a prestigious college in the field of fire.

content.Placements: Approximately, there is complete placement in my college. 60 students were placed in the last batch. The highest package was 24 LPA, and the lowest package was 5 LPA. The average package was 13 LPA. Many PSUs. Private and government companies hire engineers from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities like the library, ground, table tennis court, hostel, gym, and fire training ground are available on the campus. Mess and canteen are also available. But the quality of food is a little bad, and medical facilities are also available, such as an ambulance and a doctor.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the most mysterious and value-for-money colleges.

content.Placements: Approximately all eligible students get placed. In 2024, the highest package offered was 24 LPA. The average package offered was 13 LPA. Top recruiting companies are IOCL, BPCL, Reliance, Adani, ONGC, CPCL, IGL, etc. Many PSUs came for recruitment. Fire and safety officer roles are offered. We can join the state fire service and will get privileges there.
content.Infrastructure: We will have access to the best infrastructure in India for our course. It offers average hostel facilities with 2 to 3 cadets per room. We get good food quality for students at reasonable prices. Additional canteens are also available. There are medical facilities and mental health counselling. We might have to compromise a bit with sports facility.

faqs.question: Is BTech available at National Fire Service College?
faqs.answer: National Fire Service College offers a four-year BTech programme at the UG level. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics/English as compulsory subjects can apply for NFSC BTech programme. The institute admits students based on merit + JEE Main Paper one + the weightage ratio for these will be decided by NFSC's competent authority.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at National Fire Service College?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics/English as compulsory subjects can apply for NFSC BTech programme. Besides, aspirants must also qualify for the entrance exam to be accepted for admission. The institute admits students based on merit + JEE Main Paper one + the weightage ratio for these will be decided by NFSC's competent authority. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in National Fire Service College?
faqs.answer: No, the institute does not offer direct admission. National Fire Service College admission to a lot of courses is done through entrance exams. The institute admits students based on merit + JEE Main Paper one + the weightage ratio for these will be decided by NFSC's competent authority. Therefore, candidates must prepare well in advance, as a lot of students apply for admission to NFSC, but seats are limited.

faqs.question: Is National Fire Service College under CUET?
faqs.answer: No, National Fire Service College is not a participating university of CUET. National Fire Service College shortlists candidates based on the entrance exam, i.e., JEE (Main) 2025 Paper-I. The candidates applied through the online admission portal shall be scrutinised based on the scores in JEE (Mains) Paper-I, and the percentile scores of the candidate in the respective Board of Education will be called in a proportionate ratio decided by the competent authority based on the CRL Rank provided by NTA in the JEE (Mains) 2025.

faqs.question: Does National Fire Service College offers seat reservation?
faqs.answer: Yes, National Fire Service College offers seat reservations for various students such as SC, ST, EWS, etc. Candidates falling under the specified categories can avail of the reservation benefit only if they hold the documents proving their claim. The university reserves 27% for OBC-NCL. Below are the reservation criteria followed at NFSC :CategoryPercentageOther Backwards Classes (OBC-NCL)27%Scheduled Castes and Schedule Caste converted to Buddhism (SC)15%Schedule Tribes (ST)7.5%General – Economically Weaker Section (GEN-EWS)10%J & K Migrants5%Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme (TFW)5%

reviews.review_heading: National Fire Service College
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained AC classrooms. Hostel is cleaned on a regular basis. Food in mess is up to the mark. Hostel comprises 8 floors where each room has 2 persons staying together. Proper furniture across each room. Two proper almirahs in each room. Four-time food offered in mess every day.

reviews.review_heading: NFSC Nagpur - A disciplined, practical fire engineering college with strong placements.
reviews.review_text: For the B.Tech Fire Engineering course at NFSC Nagpur, there are air-conditioned digital classrooms, many well-equipped labs (electrical, fluid mechanics, fire protection, etc. ), a large library with Wi-Fi, and basic Wi-Fi/IT access on campus, while hostel Wi-Fi is limited or not always available. Mess food quality is usually rated average to good with veg and non-Veg options at a reasonable cost, and there is a canteen plus basic medical facilities and first aid on campus. Sports facilities in...

reviews.review_heading: In brief, the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. There are minor issues which is common in all hostels, and the infrastructure of the academic and laboratory is the best, as it has all the equipment that is required to perform practicals. If I talk about the sports, there is a ground, in the morning, on which we perform a fire drill, and the other sports group is under development.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest taking admission in this college because it is a prestigious college in the field of fire.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like the library, ground, table tennis court, hostel, gym, and fire training ground are available on the campus. Mess and canteen are also available. But the quality of food is a little bad, and medical facilities are also available, such as an ambulance and a doctor.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the most mysterious and value-for-money colleges.
reviews.review_text: We will have access to the best infrastructure in India for our course. It offers average hostel facilities with 2 to 3 cadets per room. We get good food quality for students at reasonable prices. Additional canteens are also available. There are medical facilities and mental health counselling. We might have to compromise a bit with sports facility.

reviews.review_heading: They offer fire safety courses.
reviews.review_text: Students' wellness is treated as the highest priority, so we underwent repeated counselling to share our worries and to release our stress. Hence, hostel areas are so spacious that two to three members can share a room, which avoids overcrowding in a room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Fire Service College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are 3/5, but if you are asking about fire-related equipment, it is 10/10. You will find almost every fire and safety-related equipment here. The quality of the mess is not good, and the condition of the hostels is also bad due to a lack of maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to serve the nation, then you can take this course.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi network 24/7, various labs, beautiful classroom, very nice library and a nice infrastructure mess is decent, and the cost of the mess is low. All medical facilities are available, a good sports complex, and a lot of game equipment are available in the college. This college focuses on discipline.

reviews.review_heading: Come here if you need placement.
reviews.review_text: College has an academic building in which the classrooms are air-conditioned, a projector, a PC, and furniture. There is a laboratory building for laboratories like computer, electrical, applied Physics, Chemistry, engineering graphics, thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, workshop, etc. There is also a research and development lab. There is a library building with air conditioning and Wi-Fi for free, and well-stocked and managed books. The hostel is good, most importantly, it has two elevators. Mes...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and disciplined life.
reviews.review_text: NFSC has a unique, practical-based infrastructure. The campus has fire training grounds, drill towers, a smoke house, B.A. sets, and different appliances for hands-on training. Classrooms are decent, and the library has good technical books related to fire engineering. Hostel facilities are average but manageable, and the mess food is decent for the daily routine. The college focuses more on physical drills and field training, which is the main strength of this institute.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placement, proud to join.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is good, there are triple and double sharing rooms for 1st year. Classrooms are AC centralised with good infrastructure. Mess food is also good, having good quality. The library has a separate huge building with a number of books. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel, but it is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: We Serve to Save is the best headline that represents my college.
reviews.review_text: Almost all the facilities are present that we expected. There is a two or three-seater room in my hostel, with proper facilities. There is the best infrastructure which includes a world-class library, labs, and classrooms. There is also good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: NFSC: The hidden gem for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of NFSC is very nice. We have a very big academic building where we all study and an administrative building where all the office work has been done. We have the biggest laboratory building for a single branch in India. There are a total of 18 labs and each lab consists of very expensive apparatus. Hostels are okay. There are both 2 and 3-seater rooms. The library and classrooms both are well-maintained and air-conditioned. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. But in the library, ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has value for money and gives a secure future in this field.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are air-conditioned classes, a library, and a fully organized laboratory in which there are 17 different labs. There is a fully air conditioning lift on our campus, Wi-Fi facility rooms with a balcony, and there are badminton and volleyball courts also.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Fire Service College.
reviews.review_text: The college was built on a 5-acre campus with all the required facilities supported and arranged by the management. Sports facilities like badminton courts, volleyball courts, a cricket ground, and other indoor and outdoor sports were encouraged and constructed.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students are placed in our college. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, IBM, Flipkart, Amazon, Dream 11, etc. 100% students get internships from college. Top roles are software developer and Data Scientist.
content.Infrastructure: There are more than 7 computer labs, with each having 8GB RAM and i5 processors. 24/7 Wi-Fi facilities are available for the students. There is a hostel available for the students with Wi-Fi and good food. There is a bus service available. There are 2 canteens available. There is a sports room with a Table Tennis court available for the students.

content.Placements: My batch is computer science engineering so this batch has 180 students in it. It has 3 sections, CSE A, CSE B, and CSE C. This course of CSE will take Rs. 5,00,000 for 4 years because this college provides the best placements for computer science engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Sports management is well-observed and happens twice a year, one is for only freshers and another is for all years and all departments together. All classrooms have smart boards and free Wi-Fi that you can use. The library and a reading room are also available here.

admission_overview.college_name: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application, Fee

admission_process.title: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology admissionis currently open. The college offers BTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to the Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. SVIST is affiliated withMAKAUT. The application process at theSwami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technologyis conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theSwami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology course admission2025:

SVIST courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forSwami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology courses:
Read More:Swami Vivekanand Institute of Science and Technology Brochure

Swami Vivekanand Institute of Science and Technology has a multi-step process which all the candidates need to follow to secure a seat at SVIST. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam. The institute then shortlists candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam. After the shortlisting process is over, course-wise merit lists are released, on theSVIST official website, post which interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the SVIST programmes is based on the entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of SVIST, before filling out the admission form.Step 1: SVIST Application Process 2025Students interested in getting into SVIST must submit the online application form for all UG and PG courses athttps://svist.org/as per their preferred course. The SVIST application process is completely conducted in online mode. Students can also check the detailedSwami Vivekanand Institute of Science and Technology feestructure here.Step 2: SVIST Selection Criteria 2025 & Release of Merit ListAfter the applications are submitted, the institute begins the shortlisting of candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam. The institute accepts JEE Main or OJEE ranks to shortlist candidates for BTech courses andCAT/ MAT/ JEMATscores for allotting admission to MBA.Step 3: Admission Confirmation at SVISTPost the selection rounds, candidates who are shortlisted and have their names on the merit lists can submit the fee and confirm their admission to the relevant course at SVIST

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA admission at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: For admission in a MBA programme at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the asiprants who have passed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum of 45% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the Class 12 mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology. Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of BTech ranges from INR 2.6 lakh-INR 3.7 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The eligibility criteria for the course is Class 12 with a 45% aggregate. Stduents can check the list of specialisations from the points mentioned below:Mechanical EngineeringCivil EngineeringElectrical and Electronics EngineeringElectronics and Communication EngineeringComputer Science and Engineering

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Aspirants looking for course admission at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology must sit and appear for the entrance exam as per respective courses. The course-wise selection criteria are mentioned below:BTech- JEE Mains/ WBJEEMBA- MAT/ CAT/ JEMATDiploma- JEXPOCandidates must meet the course-wise eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must complete Class 12 for graduation course and master's degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get direct admission at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Science and Technology. Aspirants must sit and appear for entrance exam as per respective courses. The college offers BTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG course, the college also offers doctorate-level courses and programme in department of basic science and humanities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in the previous 3 to 4 years.

review_content.Placements: About 60 to 70 percent of students will be placed as per the previous 2 to 3 years' records. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Mahindra, JBM, ABB, etc., should visit every year for student placements and training, and even offer internships for our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available for study purposes. We have practical labs, digital classrooms, etc. Food is available in good quality. Canteen service is elegant. Every sport is played in our college. In our college, tournaments are also organized for all nearby colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Automation and Robotics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Top infrastructure and campus with brilliant events and competitions.

review_content.Placements: 70 to 80% of students from Automation & Robotics got placed through campus drives. The highest Package offered is 10 to 12LPA off campus top recruiters. The average package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, and the lowest Package is offered 2.5 to 3LPA. Around 65 to 75% students secured internships. Some students also do academic projects or research internships with faculty tie ups.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire department has good Wi-Fi connectivity for students and faculty. Robotics Lab equipped with robotics arms, sensors, PLC kits, Automation & Control Systems Lab, Mechatronics & Embedded Systems Lab, CAD/CAM & Simulation Lab with licensed software AutoCAD, MATLAB, SolidWorks, ANSYS. Spacious, smart classrooms with projectors and audio-visual aids. Separate hostels for boys and girls with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. Rooms are generally 2 to 3 sharing, well maintained, with adequate ventilation and water supply.

review_summary.college_name: Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good, you can take admission here, and you will not regret doing that.

content.Placements: There are so many students in my class. Our class has a strength of 70 students. Talking about placements, it's very good here. Many companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good internet service via a Wi-Fi network. Students can access the internet at any time during college hours, which helps them to study and discover many things. Classrooms are well built, and the college has its own separate library for students to study. The hostel is also very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers from our college are highly educated and very knowledgeable, and the teaching quality is very good. Course curriculum is also relevant if a student studies here and puts effort on their side, then they will definitely get a good placement in the future. Semester exams are moderate. Our faculty is very serious about our future. They always try to help us in any possible way.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement, and mostly I like our college infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are about 10 out of 8 students who were placed in our college. The highest package offer in my field is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters are Mahindra and Mahindra Limited. Many roles are offered in college, like AIML, AIDS, etc. Other additional services are also available in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are above average, but our infrastructure is world-class with the availability of digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a stocked library. Food is also available in all canteens and the quality of food is also Next level and delicious.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in the previous 3 to 4 years.

content.Placements: About 60 to 70 percent of students will be placed as per the previous 2 to 3 years' records. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Mahindra, JBM, ABB, etc., should visit every year for student placements and training, and even offer internships for our students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available for study purposes. We have practical labs, digital classrooms, etc. Food is available in good quality. Canteen service is elegant. Every sport is played in our college. In our college, tournaments are also organized for all nearby colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Automation and Robotics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Top infrastructure and campus with brilliant events and competitions.

content.Placements: 70 to 80% of students from Automation & Robotics got placed through campus drives. The highest Package offered is 10 to 12LPA off campus top recruiters. The average package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, and the lowest Package is offered 2.5 to 3LPA. Around 65 to 75% students secured internships. Some students also do academic projects or research internships with faculty tie ups.
content.Infrastructure: The entire department has good Wi-Fi connectivity for students and faculty. Robotics Lab equipped with robotics arms, sensors, PLC kits, Automation & Control Systems Lab, Mechatronics & Embedded Systems Lab, CAD/CAM & Simulation Lab with licensed software AutoCAD, MATLAB, SolidWorks, ANSYS. Spacious, smart classrooms with projectors and audio-visual aids. Separate hostels for boys and girls with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. Rooms are generally 2 to 3 sharing, well maintained, with adequate ventilation and water supply.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My review of Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Centre.

content.Placements: Placements were quite good, as many companies came to the campus. Placement opportunities were ample; you just needed to grab them. We had a placement cell working for us. Placement companies like Nestle offered 4 LPA, Axis Bank offered 3.2 LPA, Deloitte offered 6 LPA, Bajaj Finserv offered 7 LPA, HDFC Mutual Fund offered 5 LPA, and HDFC Bank offered 6.4 LPA. Only a few students got selected for the best companies, but everyone who applied eventually got an offer from some company. I researched and opted for my own internship. It was an internship-cum-full-time job with a paid salary.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, and mostly I like our college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are above average, but our infrastructure is world-class with the availability of digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a stocked library. Food is also available in all canteens and the quality of food is also Next level and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in the previous 3 to 4 years.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for study purposes. We have practical labs, digital classrooms, etc. Food is available in good quality. Canteen service is elegant. Every sport is played in our college. In our college, tournaments are also organized for all nearby colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Top infrastructure and campus with brilliant events and competitions.
reviews.review_text: The entire department has good Wi-Fi connectivity for students and faculty. Robotics Lab equipped with robotics arms, sensors, PLC kits, Automation & Control Systems Lab, Mechatronics & Embedded Systems Lab, CAD/CAM & Simulation Lab with licensed software AutoCAD, MATLAB, SolidWorks, ANSYS. Spacious, smart classrooms with projectors and audio-visual aids. Separate hostels for boys and girls with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. Rooms are generally 2 to 3 sharing, well maintained, with adequ...

reviews.review_heading: My review of Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility was average, but the food quality was very good. They also had the same menu. The rooms were available on the basis of sharing three per room, and with the whole campus and hostel being Wi-Fi enabled, we did not have any requirement for entertainment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It is a very good campus. It has more than 220 acres of land. Campus is very peaceful. Our campus in Nashik has good vibes. There is a very good hostel for students. This hostel is very near campus so don't waste time reaching the college. Very good bus service is there for outside students.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members with beautiful infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is an infrastructure full of greenery. The buildings are built in alphabetical shapes which makes the campus more attractive. There are 5 large canteens in campus with good quality of food. Hostel is also available with various facilities like gym. There is a large football ground in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good events, fests, and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and our classrooms, library, and labs are well-developed. Every building has its own Wi-Fi facility with high-speed internet. The hostel rooms are very useful, but the food available in the mess is of slightly low quality. However, canteens in our college are very good. Every classroom has a sports period twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. It is clean. Washrooms are washed on a daily basis. Our campus has so much greenery. Hostels are average. Management is not good. The maximum number of students in one room is 4 but now it is 6 people. Overall campus is beautiful. We have a huge campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Nashik with best career opportunity. The campus has less natural beauty.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure having separate floors for each department and lab. Having 6 to 7 buildings each with G+2 floors and basements as well. Different labs, practice rooms, and games areas are there as well. The buildings are aligned in C shape. In the center, there is an amphitheater and a stage. We have the best college infrastructure ever. There are total of 3 messes in college with good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good than other colleges and has experience faculty members for teaching.
reviews.review_text: My college gives us good placements. It provides 100% of placements. Our college offers top best companies for interviews and placements of students. Top recruiting companies are Tata, Mahindra, ISA, and all IT sector companies for jobs and internships.

reviews.review_heading: College is not good; it is overhyped, and they spend a lot on marketing.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is one of the best in Nashik. It is a 250-acre campus, and the buildings are very good. There is greenery everywhere. It is very clean from inside. 
Canteen is good, and sports is the worst. I am not a hosteler to tell about it. The food in the mess is edible. That’s all I can say.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-managed infrastructure with good Wi-Fi connectivity. There are labs with every working instrument. Classrooms are well-equipped, and the library has every type of book. The hostel is expensive but good with facilities. There are different and many canteens with every type of food offering. The sports facility is good, with a cricket stadium inside the campus and a multi-utility stadium for other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: The facFacilities provided by our college are  labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library, are very good. Labs are very clean. Each department has separate Wi-Fi facilities, and every student is given an ID and password for Wi-Fi. Classrooms are spacious and clean, ensuring all students are comfortable.ilities provided by our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library, are very good. Labs are very clean. Each department has separate Wi-Fi facilities, and every student is given an ID an...

reviews.review_heading: Information regarding Sandip Institute of Technology and Research Center.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are available in my college, such as Wi-Fi-enabled campus, well-established classrooms, and libraries. The hostel is also good, but the food quality is not worth the money. Although several other facilities are available like medical facilities and playgrounds.

On the other hand, at the PG level, the University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers MCA and PG Diploma. Admission to the courses is on the basis of merit and entrance scores. The courses at UIET Kanpur are offered across multiple specialisations. The duration of the courses at UIET CSJMU ranges between years.

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers admission on the basis of both, merit and entrance scores. However, the institute has specified a minimum aggregate of 40% in Class 12 from any recognised national or state board. Candidates with 85% typically have a decent chance at getting admission to the institute.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get into University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University with 85%?

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU is a constituent of the CSJM University. UIET is not approved by University Grants Commission. However, University Institute of Engineering and Technology is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).
faqs.question: Q: Is University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU UGC approved?

review_summary.college_name: UIET CSJMU Kanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.

content.Placements: Placements aren't great. However, with the help of our placement cell, placements are improving. The college is approaching reputable companies. Efforts are being made to ensure good placements. This isn't solely the college's fault. Students should also have some responsibility. If students make zero effort, placements won't happen.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the mess is average. The breakfast is fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment in the recent placement cycle. 12.5 LPA (approximately) is the highest package. The average package is about 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is between 1 LPA and 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), Infosys, HCL Technologies, and Samsung Electronics. 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in companies like HCL, Infosys, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are Software Developer Engineer, Trainee Engineer, Technical Support, Management Trainee, and Business Associate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is too good in everything.

content.Placements: Mostly, students get placed, but packages are not so good. This year, placements have increased. Some seniors got selected with a package of 10 LPA. Our branch placements are excellent. Everyone got placed this year. The CS placements are average. If students want to join this college, then it is a good choice for them.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good, the infrastructure is really good, and faculty is great.

content.Placements: The placements are not very good. Around 70 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is around 3–4 LPA. However, the university placement cell is working on improving the situation. In the coming years, placements are expected to get better.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. The university atmosphere is very pleasant. 5G Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms could be better, but labs are well-maintained. Overall, the university campus is very large, with many places to explore. The hostels needs a lot of upgradation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: CSJMU Kanpur University, Kanpur.

content.Placements: The highest package is 4 LPA this year, and companies like JK Cement or Nerolac are the companies that come for hiring from the chemical department. But I feel that in the upcoming years, placement will get better as the university is also getting better and has good infrastructure.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, rooms are spacious enough, food quality is also good, Wi-Fi is provided free, but the speed is slightly less, labs and classrooms are getting upgraded, although now also they are modern and way better than others, use smartboard, and the library is also good.

admission_overview.title: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University admissions 2026 are both merit and entrance-based. The college considers JEE Main rank for admission to its flagship BTech course. The college offers various courses to candidates at the UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. These include- BTech, MCA, PhD, etc. University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University also offers courses at the Diploma level and Vocational courses.

eligibility_selection.title: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers courses at the UG,PG, Diploma and Doctorate levels. The institute offers admission to BCA, BTech (lateral entry) and PG Diploma courses based on merit of the candidates. Check below below eligibility and selection criteria before applying for admission to popular University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University courses:-

admission_process.title: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University admission processis conducted online. Candidates must apply for a course to participate in the selection rounds. Check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Candidates can apply online for a course at UIET. Aspirants need to fill out the application form on the institute's website.

The institute offers admission to its flagship BTech course based on JEE Main rank of the candidates. The seats left vacant afer last round of counselling for BTech are filled by the process of direct admission based on Class 12 scores of the candidates. The selection for MCA is based on entrance test conducted by CSJMU. For all other courses, admissions are merit-based.

Candidates need to participate in CSJMU Counselling for a seat in the BTech programme. Aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification. Selected candidates must pay theUniversity Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University feesto confirm admission at the college.

courses_data.name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 10th, ICSE, UP 10th
courses_data.description: UIET, CSJM University offers a four-year BTech course at the UG level. The institute offers BTech in Computer Science, CSE Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication, Chemical, Mechanical and Materials Science and Metallurgical Engineering. Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics subjects to apply for BTech programme. The institute also provides lateral entry to BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BTech at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees isINR 3.6 Lacs - INR 4.6 Lacsfor University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU BTech programme. Candidates need to pay the course fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat. The total fees includes components such as tuition fees, caution deposit, exam fees, etc.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU?
faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU offers BTech for four-years. The course is divided into eight semesters. Below are the BTech specialisations offered by the institute:Computer ScienceCSE Artificial IntelligenceInformation TechnologyElectronics & CommunicationChemicalMechanicalMaterials Science and Metallurgical Engineering

courses_data.name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University MCA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: UIET CSJM University offers a two-year full-time MCA programme at the PG level. The programme is divided into four semesters. Candidates are selected for MCA based on their scores in university entrance examination. Aspirants must pass a relevant undergraduate programme from a recognised university with mathematics at Class 12 level to apply for MCA programme.

faqs.question: How much is the fees for MCA at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU MCA isINR 1.4 lakh. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees includes tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fees, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MCA at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU?
faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU admission to MCA programme is based on entrance exam conducted by the university. Candidates need to pass the test to get a seat in the MCA programme. Aspirants must also meet the eligibility criteria to apply for the course. Candidates must pass relevant UG degree from a recognised universiy with Mathematics at Class 12 level to apply for MCA.

faqs.question: Is University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University under CUET?
faqs.answer: No,University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University is not under CUET. The college accepts scores of certain other entrance exams for admission, such as- JEE Mains. Hence, CUET is not required.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU without enrance exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates can get admission in BTech (lateral entry), BCA and PG Diploma courses without appearing for an entrance test. University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU shortlist candidates for these courses based on their qualifying exam scores. Aspirants need to pass the entrance exam for BTech and MCA programmes.

faqs.question: How to apply for University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University?
faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMUniversity conducts an online application process. Candidates can follow the below mentioned steps to apply to UIET:Go to the UIET CSJMU official website.Go to the 'Admissions' tab.Choose the desired course.Fill the application form with all the required information.Pay the application fee and submit the form to complete the application process.

paragraphs: According to University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU Kanpur admission brochure 2026, 39 campus drives were held and more than 214 students were placed in 2025.

tables.context: Does UIET CSJMU Kanpur offer 100% placements?

faqs.question: How are the placements at UIET CSJMU Kanpur?
faqs.answer: Placements at UIET CSJMU Kanpur is good. As per the NIRF report 2025, 190 students were placed and 51 students went for higher studies out of 302 students during the BTech placement drive 2024. The median package recorded was 3.25 LPA.

faqs.question: Does UIET CSJMU Kanpur offer 100% placements?
faqs.answer: UIET CSJMU Kanpur has not released the consolidated placement report. According to the Engineering NIRF report 2025, the number of students placed in BTech over the past three years is mentioned below: Particulars BTech Placement Statistics 2022 BTech Placement Statistics 2023 BTech Placement Statistics 2024 Total students 255 284 302 Students placed 161 183 190 Students Selected for Higher Studies 42 45 51

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters during UIET CSJMU Kanpur placements?
faqs.answer: The top recruiters during UIET CSJMU Kanpur placements in recent past included TCS, HCL, Jio, Vodafone, Cadence Design System and many more.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU placements?
faqs.answer: The top recruiters at UIET CSJMU include Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Steel Authority of India Ltd., Hindustan Lever Limited, Tata Consultancy Services, Infosys, HCL, Oswal Chemicals, Scooter India Ltd., Lohia Starlinger, Samsung Electronics, Super House, Goodlass Nerolac Paints, Koshika Telecom Ltd., NTPC, Hughes Software Systems, IBM, etc.

hostel.description: Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University has 3 girls hostel and 1 boys hostel.All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, security and surveillance system etc. The students are allowed to use their own computer in the rooms.
