reviews.review_heading: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the...

reviews.review_heading: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good enough.  There is a library, gym, swimming pool, track, helipad, canteen, etc., on the campus. The quality of food is below average, but it depends on the students. There is a sports tournament held every semester. There are medical facilities where anyone can get a check-up at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is too good in everything.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, the infrastructure is really good, and faculty is great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The university atmosphere is very pleasant. 5G Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms could be better, but labs are well-maintained. Overall, the university campus is very large, with many places to explore. The hostels needs a lot of upgradation.

reviews.review_heading: CSJMU Kanpur University, Kanpur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, rooms are spacious enough, food quality is also good, Wi-Fi is provided free, but the speed is slightly less, labs and classrooms are getting upgraded, although now also they are modern and way better than others, use smartboard, and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University.
reviews.review_text: The course structure was pretty good if you wanted to learn more programming or had an interest in computers. For research purposes, it was also good as you got a chance to explore what was happening in the technical world, and you also got a chance to make your own website or do many research projects you wanted to explore. Hostels were very well organized and well maintained by the authority. The toilets were very hygienic, the rooms were very spacious, and students were provided with a bed, a...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: The college understands that a perfect balance needs to be maintained between the skills required in the areas of system and software development to the enterprise level. The programme gives the students the right platform in the areas of software design and engineering information, education, accessibility, architecture, and project management. Separate hostel for girls and boys. Rooms are single as well as sharing. They provide all the facilities for a student including Wi-Fi. Quality of food ...

reviews.review_heading: Its great to take admission in this college, make sure to consider this for core engineering branch.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. The library has books. Our faculty at CSJMU is top-notch. They help us to get better in all aspects of learning and facing the filled day after day. I am able to generate a great interest in learning new skills, and this is because of our professor.

reviews.review_heading: Till now, this college is satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, with Wi-Fi and a smart board. Hostels are decent, there are double-sharing rooms (well spacious) and a mess which provides you with food, and there are playgrounds for playing and keeping you guys physically fit. The mess food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University.
reviews.review_text: This course is good for making our future in the software and IT field. In this course, you will learn about computer languages like C, Java, Python, HTML, PHP, and other subjects like software engineering and accounts management. It focuses on the development of teachers' subject matter knowledge, knowledge of students, and subject specialization. The hostel is good. There are about 4 hostels: 2 for girls and 2 for boys. The hostel environment is also good. The fee for the boys' hostel is about...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were great however you had to share your room with one room partner but you will got hostel rooms easily in 1st year. But 2nd year onwards seats were few but you will find Kanpur city very economical, if you were looking for a PG. The meal quality was also good and changed every day.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good as there are proper facilities and a good atmosphere. There are 2 sharing as well as separate rooms at affordable prices. The mess food is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Students who prefer a good campus life with a low JEE rank can consider this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good in the college. You can compare it with IITs, NITs, and many good private colleges. Labs are also quite good, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi-connected. The library is also quite good. In the case of hostels, you can compare them with any private college. They are decent or even too good. Both AC and non-AC categories are available. Laundry facilities are also provided by the college starting this year. The canteen is also quite good. Overall, facilities are at a d...

reviews.review_heading: Decent university with good faculty, satisfactory placements, and a peaceful campus life.
reviews.review_text: CSJMU has a fairly good infrastructure for academics as well as hostels. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and the labs are decently equipped. Classrooms are spacious with projectors in some departments and the library is well-stocked with academic and reference books. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with proper security, clean rooms, and a good maintenance team. The mess provides decent food, although variety can be improved. There are good medical facilities, a gym, sports grounds, and i...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you have a low percentile and coming for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, and you can expect good facilities. There are only two hostels for boys and four for girls. The cleanliness is good, and the food is also satisfactory. The mess staff are well-behaved, and the quality is okay sometimes good, sometimes bad. A canteen is also available.
